En: I didn't lose my gun, I have my gun! (Show him the gun.)
Zh: “我没把枪弄丢，还在这里呢！”（把枪拿给他看。）

En: We're not talking about the fucking gun anymore -- we're talking about the *vaporized cloud* of ethanol coming from your mouth.
Zh: “我们没有说你那支该死的枪了——我们说的是你嘴里吐出来的乙醇*汽化云*。”

En: This is so unfair. He knows you have the gun and *still* he's punishing you.
Zh: 这太不公平了。他知道你有枪，但*还是*在惩罚你。

En: What is it with all these *material objects*?!
Zh: 所有这些*物质的东西*是怎么回事？！

En: Yeah yeah, I got that too. (Show him the boring sidearm.)
Zh: “是啊，是啊，我也有。”（把无聊的配枪拿给他看。）

En: I don't care. Where is the gun the RCM gave you to kill people with? Where is that one?
Zh: “我不在乎。RCM发给你用来杀人的枪呢？那支枪在哪？”

En: This is a *great* gun. Maybe it's not some kind of flashy *side* arm, but still!
Zh: “这是一支*很棒*的枪。也许不是什么华而不实的*配枪*，不过还是很棒！”

En: I don't have that. I don't have the sidearm.
Zh: “我没有。我没有配枪。”

En: I *knew* it. I told you he wouldn't have it.
Zh: “我就*知道*。我告诉过你他没有。”

En: Whooh. He has it -- I thought it was in the ocean... He wipes his brow in mock relief. "You're drunk like a bum, Harry. Put that thing away before you kill someone."
Zh: “哇哦。在他手里——我还以为在海里呢……”他假装放松地擦了擦眉头。“你醉的跟个流浪汉一样，哈里。在你杀人之前，把那玩意收起来。”

En: Whooh. He has it -- *and* he didn't drop it. He wipes his brow in mock relief. "You're drunk like a bum, Harry. Put that thing away before you kill someone."
Zh: “哇哦。在他手里——*而且*他没有弄掉。”他假装放松地擦了擦眉头。“你醉的跟个流浪汉一样，哈里。在你杀人之前，把那玩意收起来。”

En: This isn't cause for celebration. It's... bad.
Zh: “这不是庆祝的理由。这个……很糟糕。”

En: I would say it's *very* bad, yes. He turns to you. "You're drunk like an asshole, Harry -- please put the stolen firearm away before you kill someone."
Zh: “要我说，是*非常*糟糕，没错。”他转向你。“你醉的像个混账一样，哈里——在你杀人之前，拜托先把那玩意收起来。”

En: Yeah, I don't have that. I don't have my sidearm.
Zh: “是啊，我没有。我没有配枪。”

En: I don't care. Where is the gun the RCM gave you to kill people with? Where is that one?
Zh: “我不在乎。RCM发给你用来杀人的枪呢？那支枪在哪？”

En: I knew it! I told you he didn't have it.
Zh: “我就知道！我告诉过你他没有。”

En: This isn't cause for celebration. It's... bad.
Zh: “这不是庆祝的理由。这个……很糟糕。”

En: Oh, I would say it's *very* bad. He turns to you. "You're drunk like a bum, Harry. Please put the stolen rifle away before you kill someone."
Zh: “要我说是*非常*糟糕。”他转向你。“你醉的像个流浪汉，哈里。在你杀人之前，拜托先把你偷来的步枪放下。”

En: This is a Triangong 4.46! It was used to kill a man from nearly a kilometre away.
Zh: “这可是特里安戈4.46步枪！它曾经杀死了大概一公里外的一个男人。”

En: Okay, I got that too. (Show him the boring sidearm.)
Zh: “好吧，那个也在我这里。”（把无聊的配枪拿给他看。）

En: *Upgraded it*? I don't care about your weapon-mania, Harry. I only care about your official sidearm -- which you *lost*.
Zh: “*升级*？我不在乎你对武器的狂热，哈里。我只在乎你的官方配枪——就是被你*弄丢*的那个。”

En: I don't have that one. I don't have my sidearm. (Lie.)
Zh: “那个我没有。我没有配枪。”（撒谎。）

En: I *knew* it. I told you he wouldn't have it.
Zh: “我就*知道*。我告诉过你他没有。”

En: Oh, I would say it's *very* bad. He turns to you. "You're drunk like a bum, Harry. Please put the gun collection away before you kill someone."
Zh: “要我说是*非常*糟糕。”他转向你。“你醉的像个流浪汉，哈里。在你杀人之前，拜托先把你的武器库拿开。

En: This isn't cause for celebration. It's... bad.
Zh: “这不是庆祝的理由。这个……很糟糕。”

En: But you haven't -- because you're *drunk*. You lost your gun -- and you're drunk. You're a drunk, gunless bum! I can smell it.
Zh: “但是你没有——因为你*喝醉*了。你把枪弄丢了——而且还喝醉了。你是个酒鬼，一个没有枪的流浪汉！我都闻出来了！”

En: So it doesn't even matter that I found my gun?!
Zh: “所以我找到枪也是无关紧要的吗？！”

En: I'm not drunk. I haven't started drinking again! (Lie.)
Zh: “我没喝醉。我没有喝酒了！”（撒谎。）

En: I'm not drunk. I haven't started drinking again!
Zh: “我没喝醉。我没有喝酒了！”

En: So what? I've had a little drink.
Zh: “那又怎么样？我只喝了一点小酒。”

En: You were never supposed to lose it in the first place. *Not lost* is your gun's *natural state*, you drunk bum.
Zh: “首先，你永远都不该弄丢它。*没有丢枪*才是*自然状态*，你这个醉醺醺的流浪汉。”

En: I quit drinking. Forever. It's only me in this boring hell hole now.
Zh: “我戒酒了。永远的。现在只有我一个人在这个无聊的地狱之城。”

En: I tried not to, but I can't work as well without it.
Zh: “我试过戒掉，但是没有它我就不能好好工作。”

En: Yeah I'm drunk! I'm also on drugs.
Zh: “是啊，我喝醉了！而且我还嗑药呢。”

En: So you... *forgot* to drink? I don't buy it. Why do you smell like a *corpse* then?
Zh: “所以你……*忘记*喝酒了？我不信。那你为什么闻起来有一股*尸体*的味道？”

En: I don't buy it. Why do you smell like a *corpse* then? Huh?
Zh: “我不信。那你为什么闻起来有一股*尸体*的味道？哈？”

En: A *little* drink?! You smell like a corpse. I'm downwind and I can barely breathe. He covers his nose. "You smell like shit."
Zh: “喝*一点*小酒？！你身上散发着尸体的味道。我在下风位置，整个人都快不能呼吸了。”他捂住鼻子。“你闻起来像屎一样。”

En: You let a suspect escape, Harry -- Klaasje-something. Because you were too *drunk* to assess her flight risk.
Zh: “你让嫌疑人逃跑了，哈里——那个叫卡拉洁还是什么的。因为你*醉的*太厉害，无法评估到她有潜逃的风险。”

En: Is that why you let a suspect escape -- Ruby-something? Because you were too fucking *drunk* to take her in?
Zh: “这就是你让嫌疑人逃跑的原因吗——那个叫露比还是什么的人？因为你他妈*醉的*太厉害，没办法拘留她？”

En: Is that why a suspect shot herself in the head -- Ruby-something? Under the boardwalk? You went in drunk and *intimidated* her?
Zh: “这就是你让嫌疑人自己爆头的原因吗————那个叫露比还是什么的人？就在木板道下面？你醉醺醺地进去，还*恐吓*她吗？”

En: *Well?* You let the suspect escape! Klaasje-something. Because you were too *drunk* to assess her flight risk.
Zh: “*什么*？你让嫌疑人逃跑了！叫卡拉洁还是什么的那个。因为你*醉的*太厉害，无法评估到她有潜逃的风险。”

En: *Well*? Harry, you let the suspect escape -- Ruby-something. You were too *drunk* to take her in, weren't you?
Zh: “*什么*？哈里，你让嫌疑人逃跑了！那个叫露比还是什么的那个。因为你*醉的*太厉害，没办法拘留她，不是吗？”

En: *Well?!* A suspect shot herself in the head, Harry. I know what you did -- you went in drunk and *intimidated* her, didn't you!?
Zh: “*什么*？哈里，嫌疑人自己一枪爆头了。我知道你做了什么——你醉醺醺地进去，还*恐吓*她了，对吗？”

En: Who are you posing for, Harry? You let the suspect escape -- a certain Ruby. You were too fucking *high* to take her in, weren't you?
Zh: “你是给谁摆造型呢，哈里？你让嫌疑人逃跑了——某个叫露比的人。你他妈当时正*嗨*着呢，没办法拘留她，不是吗？”

En: Who are you posing for, huh? A suspect escaped, Harry. Klaasje-something. Because you were too *high* to assess her flight risk.
Zh: “你是给谁摆造型呢，哈？一个嫌疑人逃跑了，哈里。那个叫卡拉洁还是什么的人。因为你他妈当时正*嗨*，无法评估到她有潜逃的风险。”

En: A woman shot herself -- in the head. Because you went in high and *intimidated* her, didn't you!? Ruby-something? You basically *killed* her yourself.
Zh: “一个女人自杀了——自己爆头。因为当时你嗑嗨了，还跑进去*威胁*她，是吗？！那个叫露比什么的人？你基本上是亲手*杀*了她。”

En: He's wounded. He looks at you. "It's been a long week -- and he's handled an actual corpse."
Zh: “他受伤了。”他看着你。“这是漫长的一周——而且他还处理了一具真正的尸体。”

En: Yeah, I've handled an actual corpse.
Zh: “是啊，我处理了一具真正的尸体。”

En: I've handled an actual corpse.
Zh: “我处理了一具真正的尸体。”

En: Yeah, it's been a bit of a week. I'm sorry I smell bad.
Zh: “是啊，大概有一星期了。很抱歉，我身上的味道很糟糕。”

En: I'm sorry I smell bad. It's been a bit of a week.
Zh: “很抱歉，我身上的味道很糟糕。大概有一星期了。”

En: None of this matters. My *odour* situation? It's *meaningless* compared to what I've discovered.
Zh: “这些都不重要。我的*气味*情况？跟我的发现相比，这根本*毫无意义*。”

En: What you've *discovered*? You let the suspect *escape* -- a certain Ruby. Because you were too *drunk* to take her in. You went in drunk.
Zh: “你*发现*了什么？你让嫌疑人*逃跑*了——某个叫露比的人。因为你喝的太*醉*，没能拘留她。你醉醺醺地跑进去了。”

En: What you've *discovered*? You let the suspect *escape* -- a certain Klaasje. Because you were you too *drunk* to assess her flight risk!
Zh: “你*发现*了什么？你让嫌疑人*逃跑*了——某个叫卡拉洁的人。因为你喝的太*醉*，无法评估到她有潜逃的风险！”

En: Oh? Is that why the suspect shot herself in the head? Under the boardwalk? You went in drunk and *intimidated* her.
Zh: “哦？这就是嫌疑人自己一枪爆头的原因？就在木板道下面？你醉醺醺地跑进去，而且还*威胁*她。”

En: A bit of a week? He squints. "You're drunk. And you let a suspect *escape* -- a certain Klaasje. Because you were you too *drunk* to assess her flight risk."
Zh: “大概一星期？”他眯起眼睛。“你喝醉了。而且你还让嫌疑人*逃跑*了——某个叫卡拉洁的人。因为你喝的太*醉*，无法评估到她有潜逃的风险！”

En: A bit of a week? He squints. "You let a suspect *escape* -- a certain Ruby. You let her escape because you were too *drunk* to take her in."
Zh: “大概一星期？”他眯起眼睛。“你喝醉了。而且你还让嫌疑人*逃跑*了——某个叫露比的人。因为你喝的太*醉*，没能拘留她。”

En: A bit of a week? He squints. "You're drunk. You let the suspect shoot herself in the head. You went in drunk and *intimidated* her."
Zh: “大概一星期？”他眯起眼睛。“你喝醉了。你让嫌疑人自己一枪爆头。你醉醺醺地跑进去，而且还*威胁*她。”

En: I don't believe you. He squints. "You're drunk. You let a suspect *escape* -- a certain Ruby. Because you were too *drunk* to take her in."
Zh: “我不信你。”他眯起眼睛。“你喝醉了。而且你还让嫌疑人*逃跑*了——某个叫露比的人。因为你喝的太*醉*，没能拘留她。”

En: I don't believe you. He squints. "You're drunk. You made a suspect shoot herself in the head. You went in drunk and *intimidated* her."

Zh: “感到困扰？！哈里，你他妈的看起来都需要器官移植了！”

En: He takes a deep breath. "Fuck it, let's not get into that."
Zh: 他深吸一口气。“去他妈的吧，我们不谈这个了。”

En: Oh really?! They don't seem bothered by it? That's because you're a cop in an exoskeleton!
Zh: “真的吗？！他们好像并不困扰？那是因为你是个穿着外骨骼的警察！”

En: Yeah, I'm a cop in a goddamn exoskeleton.
Zh: “是啊，我是个穿着外骨骼的该死警察。”

En: Yes... I am a goddamn cop.
Zh: “是的……我是个该死的警察。”

En: Oh... that explains it.
Zh: “哦……那就能解释通了。”

En: Actually -- are you? Are you still a cop? There's so much disco going on, it's hard to tell.
Zh: “实际上你是吗？你还是个警察吗？基于你这么*迪斯科*的经历，很难说啊。”

En: Yes, that has *always* explained it.
Zh: “是的，这*总是*能解释通的。”

En: This is not the first time he's seen you all decked out in wacko.
Zh: 这不是他第一次看见你穿着古怪的衣服了。

En: Now that you start thinking about it -- maybe they *were* afraid of you...
Zh: 现在你一想——也许他们*的确*很怕你……

En: Harry, that's because you're a cop with 'Fuck the World' written on his back.
Zh: “哈里，那是因为你是个警察，而且背后还写着‘花花世界我一人干翻’。”

En: Special Consultant Trant Heidelstam, Patrol Officer Judit Minot.
Zh: “特别顾问特兰特·海德斯塔姆，巡警茱蒂特·迈诺特。”

En: ...aaaand he's said it.
Zh: ……他是这么说的。

En: No, Kim, you've gotta have my back. Let's destroy them.
Zh: “不，金，你必须支持我。让我们消灭他们吧。”

En: Don't worry, *many* people have seen me like this. No one said anything.
Zh: “别担心，*很多*人见过我这幅样子。谁都没说什么。”

En: Okay, I see. Yes.
Zh: “好吧，我明白了。没错。”

En: No, no, no! You've sensitivity tested this!
Zh: 不不不！你的敏感性已经测试过了！

En: Harry, there are probably pictures... The full gravity of the situation dawns on him.
Zh: “哈里，可能会有相片的……”他渐渐开始明白事态的严重性。

En: They're going to fuck us to death.
Zh: “他们会把我们玩死的。”

En: Yes, Trant Heidelstam says. "There could have been cameras. This needs damage control."
Zh: “是的。”特兰特·海德斯塔姆说道。“可能会有相机。我们需要损害控制。”

En: There weren't any cameras around. He stares at his boots. "They don't have cameras..."
Zh: “附近没有任何相机。”他盯着脚上的靴子。“他们没有相机……”

En: Cuno's liking this tense shit.
Zh: “坤诺喜欢这种紧张的狗屎。”

En: As if he recalled that he's, in fact, a decorated police lieutenant, and not a naughty boy.
Zh: 仿佛他回想起来，他实际上是一个授勋的警督，而不是一个调皮的小男孩。

En: Pissf****t. Singular.
Zh: “弱水三千只取一尿饮。独一无二。”

En: No one has been afraid of you without you knowing. They all felt perfectly safe.
Zh: 没人会在你不知道的情况下害怕你。他们全都感觉非常安全。

En: Everyone felt perfectly safe in your company. He doesn't know what he's talking about.
Zh: 在你的陪伴下，每一个人都感觉到非常安全。他根本不知道自己在说什么。

En: I *know* when people are uncomfortable around me. They haven't been.
Zh: “如果我周围的人感觉不自在，我会*知道*的。但他们没有。”

En: Believe me, they felt uncomfortable.
Zh: “相信我，他们感觉很不自在。”

En: No... Trant, it's too late. You're part of this shit now! He turns to you. "What have you got to say for yourself, shitkid?"
Zh: “不……特兰特，太迟了。现在这破事也有你一份！”他转向你。“你有什么要说的吗，臭小子？”

En: Whatever this is, it is completely unimportant compared to what you've just *seen*.
Zh: 不管这到底是要干嘛，与你刚刚*看见*的生物相比，这事完全无关紧要。

En: Forget about all this, there's a giant...
Zh: “忘了这一切吧，有一只巨大的……”

En: We're not forgetting about anything -- look at you! He points at you with both hands.
Zh: “我们什么都不会忘——看看你！”他用两只手指着你。

En: This is the Man with Sunglasses from the Whirling-in-Rags! But where are his sunglasses?
Zh: 他就是褴褛飞旋里那个墨镜男！但是他的墨镜去哪了？

En: Wait... you're the Man with Sunglasses.
Zh: “等等……你是那个墨镜男。”

En: That's right, and you're some kind of a... urban scarecrow thing.
Zh: “没错，你是某种……都市流浪汉。”

En: That's right -- and you're bleeding.
Zh: “没错——而且你在流血。”

En: Yes-yes... What's *wrong* with you?
Zh: “是啊，是啊……你到底有什么*毛病*？”

En: That's right -- and you're some kind of... murder machine.
Zh: “没错——而你是某种……杀人机器。”

En: That's right, and you look like you got twenty STDs.
Zh: “没错，而且你看起来像是得了20种性病。”

En: Cuno, you still have my back, right?
Zh: “坤诺，你还会站在我这边，对吧？”

En: We're all pigs here. He nods to you, then straightens his back.
Zh: “我们都是猪猡。”他朝你点点头，然后挺直了腰杆。

En: Even though we're all pigs here, you and Cuno are more pigs than the rest of the pigs. He'll have your back -- only later.
Zh: 尽管我们这里都是猪猡，你和坤诺也比其他人要更像猪猡一些。他会支持你的——只是要晚些时候。

En: Uh -- big boy shit?
Zh: “呃——大男孩的东西？”

En: Yeah, big shit. He nods and crosses his arms, regally. "Now listen up suit-fuck. You're gonna shit yourself, because it's gonna get wacko-natural."
Zh: “是啊，大狗屎。”他点点头，抱起双臂，像个小皇帝。“听好了，你个西装男。我接下来要讲的超超超自然事件会让你吓到拉肚子。”

En: It had gathered *items* in its nest: behold, a passport.
Zh: “它把*东西*都收藏在自己的巢穴里：看，一本护照。”

En: He, uh... being a Communard probably had to do with it. You know, class warfare stuff.
Zh: “他，呃……可能跟他是一个公社社员有关。你知道的，阶级战争之类的。”

En: It had gathered *items* in its nest: a helmet and a scope.
Zh: “它把*东西*都收藏在自己的巢穴里：一个头盔，还有一本护照。”

En: It had gathered *items* in its nest: a helmet, a scope, and a passport.
Zh: “它把*东西*都收藏在自己的巢穴里：一个头盔，一个瞄准镜，还有一本护照。”

En: It had gathered *items* in its nest: behold, a passport.
Zh: “它把*东西*都收藏在自己的巢穴里：看，一本护照。”

En: Cuno -- Shush.
Zh: “坤诺——安静。”

En: I did everything I could. The company had hired unvetted...
Zh: “我已经尽力了。公司雇佣了未审核的……”

En: No. He stops you. "You've explained enough, pig. Cuno takes care of this shit now."
Zh: “不。”他阻止了你。“你已经解释的够多了，猪猡。现在交给坤诺来处理。”

En: First of all, yo -- those guys were all f****ts. The guys in the armour? F****ts. The Union guys? F****ts. So yeah -- He stares Vicquemare in the eye. "Suck Cuno's dick. You don't *know* me."
Zh: “首先，哟——那些家伙都是狗屎。穿着盔甲的那个男人？狗屎。工会的人？狗屎。所以——”他直视维克玛的眼睛。“去你妈的蛋吧。你根本*不了解*我。”

En: You don't *know* what happened here. You don't know this shit. Automatic fucking weapons. Urban battleground shit. Battle lines drawn in *blood*. Blood Meridian. You don't *know* this shit.
Zh: “你根本*不了解*这里发生了什么。你不了解这一堆破事。该死的自动武器。狗屁都市战场。被*鲜血*染红的战线。血色顶点。你根本*不了解*这些狗屎。”

En: Now -- Cuno wasn't there. Right -- you getting this? Cuno was breaking it up with Cuno's main bitch C. Parting-of-the-ways shit. But when Cuno got there -- pig had fucking *cleaned up*. Blood and ruin.
Zh: “现在——坤诺不在那里。没错——你明白了吗？坤诺在跟坤诺的马子闹分手，分道扬镳之类的狗屁。但是当坤诺赶到的时候——猪猡他妈的已经*清理干净*了。血和尸体都清干净了。”

En: Smoked all those dinky fuckers. Saved this shit -- Martinaise shit. I see he's mournin' and shit.... His main pig got semi-wasted. Sent to the boo-boo-mobile -- Cuno steps up. Cuno fucking FILLS those shoes. Big boy shoes -- Detective Cuno.
Zh: “把那些微不足道的混账都干掉了。拯救了这个狗屁玩意——该死的马丁内斯。我看见他在哀悼……他的猪猡搭档废了一半。被送到了車里——坤诺站了出来。坤诺他妈的代替他。大人的位置——警探坤诺。”

En: Oh no.... *all* in.
Zh: 哦不……*全盘*参与。

En: Yo, Cuno feels like you weren't really *listening* to Cuno. He drills his left temple with his index finger. "You were hearin' -- but you weren't listenin'. F***y f*g and the armour boys came to Martinaise to fuck shit up."
Zh: “哟，坤诺觉得你根本没有认真*听*坤诺的话。”他用食指抵住了太阳穴。“你觉得你在听——但是你没在听。那群狗杂种，还有那些盔甲小子，他妈的都是来马丁内斯搞破坏的。”

En: Are you done?
Zh: “你说完了吗？”

En: Hardie *boys* or whatever the fuck they are -- they were tellin' everyone and their mom how they wasted one of those armour fucks. It was *always* gonna go down like that. My pig stepped up -- got fucked in the leg for it. Sacrifice style.
Zh: “哈迪*兄弟*或者不管他们是什么鬼——他们告诉所有人，还有他们的老娘，说自己是怎么干掉那个穿盔甲的混账的。*总是*会这样到处传开。我的猪猡站了出来——还为此把大腿搞伤了，自我牺牲式的。”

En: Yes. I understand. He was in the fight.
Zh: “是的。我能理解。他也卷入了那场战斗。”

En: Second -- you dinky fucking asshole. This pig right here, he points to you, "this oink-oink motherfucker *solved* that shit. On Death Island. Case solved. Go home, or fuck off."
Zh: “第二——你们这些傻逼混账。这个猪猡，”他指向你，“这个只会哼哼的混账*解决*了这个案子。在死亡岛上。案子破了。你们要么回家，要么滚蛋。”

En: Yes. Go home or fuck off.
Zh: “是的。要么回家，要么滚蛋。”

En: Look -- point is, we solved the case.
Zh: “你看——问题是，我们把案子破了。”

En: Look -- point is, we saved as many people as we could.
Zh: “你看——问题是，我们尽力挽救了很多人。”

En: Lieutenant. Really... I...
Zh: “警督。真的……我……”

En: Yeah -- some fucked up grandpa did it. Fuckin' grandpa in the woods or some shit. Old shit. Cuno doesn't know about that. Look -- the REAL shit here is...
Zh: “哦耶——是个该死的老头子干得。丛林里的老头子还是什么的。老不死的。坤诺不知道那个。看——真正的狗屁玩意是……”

En: It was a straggler -- from the Revolution. Who's stayed in hiding for 50 years. I found him.
Zh: “是一个大革命时期的逃兵。他在那里躲藏了50多年。我找到他了。”

En: Cuno, if you're going to interrupt -- make it snappier.
Zh: “坤诺，如果你要打断我的话——那就干脆点。”

En: I'll make it tight, pig. Don't worry, the Cunn is on it.
Zh: “我会简短一点的，猪猡。别担心，坤诺可以的。”

En: Not bad, Cuno. Could be a little *shorter* though.
Zh: 还不赖，坤诺。不过可能有点太*简短*了。

En: Don't think it's a good idea to let him speak.
Zh: 我觉得让他说话并不是个好主意。

En: Yeah-yeah, straggler, sure. He nods to you, then turns back to Vicquemare. "You getting this *smart* shit? The old fuck killed him. Confessed to it too. We got him snitchin' on himself -- popo style."
Zh: “哦耶，逃兵，没错。”他朝你点点头，然后转向了维克玛。“你搞明白这个*巧妙*的花招了吗？那个老混账杀了他。还认罪了。我们让他自己说出来了——警察的风格。”

En: He may have committed *other* murders over the years.
Zh: “这些年来，他可能还犯下了*其他*几起凶杀案。”

En: He may have committed other murders over the years -- we have him confessing to one too. A big one.
Zh: “这些年来，他可能还犯下了其他几起凶杀案——我们也让他招供了一个。一个大案。”

En: You may want to rethink your strategy of letting a 12 year old present your case.
Zh: 你可能要重新考虑让一个12岁的小孩陈述案情的策略。

En: Wait, by gun of the killer, Cuno means the murder weapon. We have it.
Zh: “等等，凶手的枪，坤诺的意思是凶器。我们拿到了。”

En: Mmmhm. He nods, looking Vicquemare in the eye. "Murder weapon, big boy shit. My piggo tried to show you, but you shit the bed."
Zh: “嗯。”他点点头，直视维克玛的眼睛。“凶器，大男孩的玩意。我的猪猡想拿给你看，不过你他妈的搞错了。”

En: Yeah, spin that real shit, pig. Murder weapon, big boy shit.
Zh: “是啊，拿出来吧，猪猡。凶器，大男孩的玩意。”

En: Yeah, big shit. We taking them *all* down. We cleaning this shit up. He nods and crosses his arms, regally. "Now listen up suit-fuck. You're gonna shit yourself, because it's gonna get wacko-natural."
Zh: “是啊，狗屎。我们把他们*全部*干掉了。我们清理了这一团狗屎。”他点点头，抱起双臂，像个小皇帝。“听好了，你个西装男。我接下来要讲的超超超自然事件会让你吓到拉肚子，因为这样才他妈叫超逼自然。”

En: Yeah -- smoked a ton of people -- unsolved shit. He nods and crosses his arms regally. "Now listen up, suit-fuck. You're gonna shit yourself, because it's gonna get wacko-natural."
Zh: “是啊——干掉了很多人——未解之谜之类的狗屁。”他点点头，抱起双臂，像个小皇帝。“听好了，你个西装男。我接下来要讲的超超超自然事件会让你吓到拉肚子，因为这样才叫超逼自然。”

En: Yeah -- and solved that shit. Fucking... grandpa in the woods did it. Old shit. Cuno doesn't know about that. Look -- the REAL SHIT here is...
Zh: “是啊——解决这个狗屁案子了。该死的……丛林里的老头子做的。老不死的。坤诺不知道那个。看——真正的狗屁玩意是……”

En: Say nothing.
Zh: 什么也不说。

En: Wait. It's *not* going to get that. Let me...
Zh: “等等，还没到超自然的部分。先让我……”

En: A straggler -- from the Revolution? He sounds incredulous.
Zh: “一个逃兵——大革命时期的？”他听起来有些怀疑。

En: Yeah, fucko. He's on the island right now. In a coma or some shit. Oh -- and we also got the gun. Gun-of-the-killer shit. You know what I mean. *Now* let's get our big boy shit on...
Zh: “哦耶，混球。他现在就在岛上。昏迷了还是什么的。哦——我们还拿到枪了。杀手的枪什么狗屁的。你知道我是什么意思。*现在*我们来说狗屁大男孩的事……”

En: He means murder weapon.
Zh: 他的意思是凶器。

En: Wacko-natural. I think I know what it's gonna be...
Zh: 超逼自然。我想我知道是什么……

En: Too late -- we're *in* this. There's a fucking FOUR-TON MANTIS on the island.
Zh: “太迟了——我们已经*卷进来*了。那个岛上他妈的有一只巨大的四条腿的螳螂。”

En: His hand is shaking with rage and excitement.
Zh: 他的手因为激动和兴奋而颤抖。

En: This case -- this fucking grandpa shit.... this ugly shit? It's *nothing*. We saw a ghost. A real life ghost. Like he fucking proved *ghosts* are real -- it's that big, popo. It's fucking...
Zh: “这个案子——这个该死的老头子……这些丑陋的狗屎？根本*不算什么*。我们看见了一个幽灵。一个活生生的幽灵。他他妈的证明了*幽灵*是真的——真有那么大，条子。他妈的……”

En: There's a fucking FOUR-TON MANTIS on the island.
Zh: “岛上他妈的有一只四条腿的螳螂。”

En: What?! he scoffs, then turns to you. "Sorry, kid, me and Harry need to..."
Zh: “什么？！”他嘲笑到，然后转向你。“抱歉，孩子，我和哈里需要……”

En: His patience has all but run out. The boy better wrap it up...
Zh: 他的耐性已经全部耗尽。男孩最好到此为止……

En: Yo -- this is like the biggest moment in history right now. You wanna fucking listen to what's coming out of Cuno's *mouth*. He points to his crooked scowl.
Zh: “哟——现在就像是历史上最伟大的时刻。你他妈的仔细听好坤诺*嘴里*说出来的话。”他指向自己扭曲又阴沉的脸。

En: This fucking *old* popo *discovered* it. Me and the pig-bacon discovered a new *species*. It was beautiful. It was... He pauses, out of breath, then continues: "You ain't seen this kind of animal before. Fucking *miracle* shit."
Zh: “这个该死的*老*警察*发现*了它。我和猪猡发现了一个新*物种*。它很漂亮。它……”他停了下来，气喘吁吁，然后继续说道：“你之前绝对没见过这种动物。他妈的简直就是个*奇迹*。”

En: He gulps, overcome with awe.
Zh: 他有些喘不过气来，心中满是敬畏。

En: We saw a giant insect. White as fuck. *Literally* the Insulindian phasmid or some shit. Praying mantis-style. It was three metres tall, and this pig right here... He points his finger at you.
Zh: “我们看见一只巨大的昆虫。妈的特别白。*毫不夸张*，就是伊苏林迪竹节虫或者什么的。螳螂之类的。它有三米多高，然后这个猪猡……”他用手指指向你。

En: His eyes are welling up now.
Zh: 现在他的双眼湿润了。

En: Why are you not fucking shitting yourselves -- what's wrong?! He glares at the officers, who stand silently in the cold wind. In the distance a wave breaks...
Zh: “你他妈的为什么不——出什么事了？！”他瞥了一眼默默站在冷风中的警官们。远处传来一波海浪的声音……

En: Why are you not fucking shitting yourselves -- what's wrong?! He glares at the officers standing silently in the rain. The water is coming down hard, washing the concrete...
Zh: “你他妈的为什么不——出什么事了？！”他瞥了一眼默默站在大雨中的警官们。雨水倾盆而下，冲洗着混凝土……

En: Why are you not fucking shitting yourselves -- what's wrong?! He glares at the officers standing silently in the falling snow. They look back at him, seemingly at a loss.
Zh: “你他妈的为什么不——出什么事了？！”他瞥了一眼默默站在大雪中的警官们。他们回望着他，似乎有些茫然。

En: Did he just say... Insulindian phasmid?
Zh: “他刚才是不是说了……伊苏林迪竹节虫？”

En: I don't know. I zoned out. Harry -- He turns you. "Did you just pick up some island bum and pin it on him?"
Zh: “我不知道。我有些迷糊。哈里——”他转向你。“你是不是随便找了个岛上的流浪汉，然后把罪名加到他头上了？”

En: You aren't fucking *listening*! The bum is nothing. This is science history here. It was the Insulindian phasmid. It's *connected* to this shit. He turns to you. "Tell him!"
Zh: “你他妈的根本没*听*！那个流浪汉根本不算什么，我说的可是要载入科学史册的！它是伊苏林迪竹节虫，它跟这个鬼案子是有*关系*的。”他转向你。“告诉他！”

En: There was no Insulindian phasmid.
Zh: “没有什么伊苏林迪竹节虫。”

En: There was an Insulindian phasmid. But it's not connected to the case.
Zh: “是有一只伊苏林迪竹节虫。不过跟案子没有关系。”

En: There was an Insulindian phasmid. *And* it may be connected to the case.
Zh: “是有一只伊苏林迪竹节虫。*而且*可能跟案子有点关系。”

En: WHAT?! I can't fucking *believe* this shit... He's lying! He turns back to them. "He's fucking lying. We were *just* there, he went up to it. He touched it! He fucking *talked* to it!"
Zh: “什么？！”我他妈的真是不敢*相信*……他在撒谎！”他转向他们。“他妈的，他在撒谎。我们*刚刚*就在那里，他还走过去了。他摸过了！他妈的，他还跟它*说过话*！”

En: WHAT?! I can't fucking *believe* this shit... He's lying! He turns back to them. "He's fucking lying. We were *just* there, he went up to it. He fucking touched it!"
Zh: “什么？！”我他妈的真是不敢*相信*……他在撒谎！”他转向他们。“他妈的，他在撒谎。我们*刚刚*就在那里，他还走过去了。他个混账还摸过了！”

En: Lieutenant, please -- you have to have more than just some *mantis*. The straggler -- stick to that. You said you solved the murder.
Zh: “警督，拜托——你总不能只发现了什么*螳螂*吧。那个逃兵——继续往下说。你说案子已经破了。”

En: This sounds insane, Harry. What did you *do* on that island?
Zh: “听起来太疯狂了，哈里。你在岛上*做了*什么？”

En: He's genuinely alarmed now.
Zh: 现在他是真的慌了神。

En: It's not going well. Present something now -- something sane and clear. Make your case.
Zh: 这样不太顺利啊。现在拿出点东西来——某种理智又清晰的东西。捍卫你的立场。

En: Something that proves you haven't lost your mind.
Zh: 某种可以证明你没发疯的东西。

En: No. There was a giant insect and they *have* to understand that. You will find proof. Don't give up.
Zh: 不。岛上有一只巨大的昆虫，他们*必须*理解这一点。你会找到证据的。别放弃。

En: It's not going well. You have to present something now. Something sane and forceful. Make your case.
Zh: 这样不太顺利啊。现在拿出点东西来。某种理智又有说服力的东西。捍卫你的立场。

En: POOR kid?! Fuck you, f****t! Cuno's loaded! The boy clenches his bony fists so hard the knuckles turn white. "Can't *believe* you're not believing me..."
Zh: “可怜的孩子？！去你妈的，混球！坤诺很有钱！”男孩狠狠攥紧了瘦骨嶙峋的拳头，连关节都发白了。“真不敢*相信*，你居然不相信我……”

En: The company hired unvetted mercenaries. It was their fault. I did all I could.
Zh: “公司雇佣了未经审查的雇佣兵。是他们的错。我已经尽力了。”

En: If Kim were here right now, he'd tell you it was inevitable.
Zh: “如果金在这里，他会告诉你说这是不可避免的。”

En: I got shot too -- TWICE. I did my absolute best.
Zh: “我也中枪了——两次。我已经完全尽力了。”

En: I got shot too -- in that fight. (Point to your leg.) "I did my absolute best."
Zh: “我也中枪了——在那种交火中。”（指着你的腿。）“我已经完全尽力了。”

En: Don't make this about Lieutenant Kitsuragi. He's a *great* cop -- and you almost got him killed. I don't even understand why you're *here* after he got shot.
Zh: “别拿曷城警督说事。他是个*很棒*的警察——你差点就害死他了。我甚至都不明白，他中枪之后，你为什么还在*这里*。”

En: That's right, it was a massacre. They got what was coming to them.
Zh: “没错，那是一场大屠杀。不过他们那是自找的。”

En: You went in drunk and got people killed. He shakes his head. "Why are you even *here* -- after Kitsuragi got shot? What else could you possibly fuck up?"
Zh: “你醉醺醺地闯了进去，还害死了别人。”他摇摇头。“你为什么会在*这里*——在曷城中枪之后？你还能惹出什么乱子来？”

En: You went in drunk and you got yourself shot -- and others killed. He sighs, then continues more calmly: "Why are you even *here* after Kitsuragi got shot?"
Zh: “你醉醺醺地闯了进去，自己中枪了不说——还害死了别人。”他叹了一口气，然后更镇定地说道：“你为什么会在*这里*——在曷城中枪之后？”

En: Who? Who got what was coming to them? The civilians? Lieutenant Kitsuragi? Why are you even *here* after he got shot? What else could you possibly fuck up?
Zh: “谁？谁是自找的？市民吗？曷城警督？他中枪之后，你到底为什么还会在*这里*？你还能惹出什么乱子来？”

En: I solved the case. A straggler from the Revolution shot the merc. He was hiding for *fifty* years on that island before I found him.
Zh: “我破案了。一个大革命时期的逃兵射杀了那个雇佣兵。在我找到他之前，他在那座岛上躲藏了*50*年。”

En: A straggler? From the *Revolution?* He sounds incredulous.
Zh: “一个逃兵？*大革命*时期的？”他听起来有些怀疑。

En: Yeah -- from the Revolution. He has killed others too -- the previous Union leader, for one.
Zh: “是啊——大革命时期的。他还杀过其他人——比如说，前任工会领袖。”

En: Yeah -- from the Revolution. He may have killed others too.
Zh: “是啊——大革命时期的。他可能还杀过其他人。”

En: It's wild. But I have a confession *and* a murder weapon. He's on the island now -- waiting for arrest.
Zh: “这是很疯狂。不过我拿到了供词，*还有*凶器。他现在就在岛上——等着被逮捕。”

En: You just left him on the island -- unguarded?
Zh: “你就这么把他留在岛上——毫无防备？”

En: What is this man -- eighty? Ninety? What are we talking about here? A *octogenarian* sniper?
Zh: “他多大了——80岁？90岁？我们在说什么呢？一个*八九十岁*的狙击手？”

En: It's okay. A giant insect -- three metres tall -- came out of the reeds and left him in a catatonic state.
Zh: “没事的。一只巨大的昆虫——有三米多高——从芦苇丛里跑了出来，把他吓得紧张症发作了。”

En: I don't know. What I *do* know is -- there was no giant stick insect on the island. That would be insane.
Zh: “我不知道。我*只*知道一点——岛上有一只巨大的竹节虫。实在是太疯狂了。”

En: There is a *perfect* explanation for that!
Zh: 对此肯定能有一个*完美*的解释！

En: Gulp.
Zh: 哽住了。

En: Speak up, lieutenant, she tries to reassure you. "It's okay. I believe there was a straggler."
Zh: “大声说出来吧，警督，”她试着安慰你。“没事的。我相信那个逃兵的存在。”

En: What is this, a joke? We *will* dump you, Harry. We will leave you here -- you'll be just another bum on the coast. This is a *trial*. Stop fucking around.
Zh: “这是什么，一个笑话吗？我们*会*抛弃你的，哈里。我们会把你留在这里——你会变成另一个在海岸边游荡的流浪汉。这是一场*审判*。别他妈的再胡闹了。”

En: It's no joke. I found the biggest land invertebrate ever found. I discovered a new species.
Zh: “这不是笑话。我发现了迄今为止最大的陆地无脊椎动物。我发现了一个新物种。”

En: It's no joke. I found the Insulindian phasmid. I discovered a new species.
Zh: “这不是笑话。我找到了伊苏林迪竹节虫。我发现了一个新物种。”

En: This sounds insane, Harry. What did you *do* on that island? What happened to you?
Zh: “听起来太疯狂了，哈里。你在岛上*做了*什么？你出什么事了？”

En: He's genuinely concerned now.
Zh: 现在他是真的慌了神。

En: It's not going well. You have to present something sane and forceful. Make your case. You've done stuff. Good stuff.
Zh: 这样不太顺利啊。现在拿出点东西来。某种理智又有说服力的东西。捍卫你的立场。做你擅长的那些事。好事。

En: Lieutenant, please. The straggler -- just... stick to that. You said you *solved* the case?
Zh: “警督，拜托——你总不能只发现了什么*螳螂*吧。那个逃兵——继续往下说。你说案子已经*破*了？”

En: She's right. This is not going well for you. You have to present something coherent -- and sane.
Zh: 她说得没错。这样对你很不利。你必须拿出点有说服力的东西——理智的东西。

En: Something that proves you haven't completely lost it. Something *solid*. You've *done* things. Good things. List those.
Zh: 某种证明你没有完全疯掉的东西。某种*可靠*的东西。你*做过*一些事情。很好的事情。说出来吧。

En: No. There was a giant insect and they *have* to understand that. You will find proof. Don't give up.
Zh: 不。岛上有一只巨大的昆虫，他们*必须*理解这一点。你会找到证据的。别放弃。

En: The biggest land invertebrate ever found? It's anything but funny. Also, I think it's connected to the case.
Zh: “发现迄今为止最大的陆地无脊椎动物？这不是在开玩笑。而且，我觉得它跟这起案子有关联。”

En: Ha ha ha... (Laugh nervously.) "I don't know why I won't stop talking about the *three-metres-tall stick insect*. There was no insect!"
Zh: “哈哈哈……”（紧张地笑了。）“我不知道自己为什么会不停地说起那个*三米高的竹节虫*。根本没有什么昆虫！”

En: This is *not* a joke. We *will* dump you, Harry. We will leave you here -- and you'll be just another bum on the coast. Take this as your *trial*. Stop fucking around.
Zh: “这*不是*笑话。我们*会*抛弃你的，哈里。我们会把你留在这里——你会变成另一个在海岸边游荡的流浪汉。把这当作是对你的*审判*。别他妈的再胡闹了。”

En: I talked to it. It told me about the pale and the Oxygen Holocaust, and how its antenna turned into a foot.
Zh: “我跟它聊过了。它给我讲了灰域和氧气浩劫，还有它的触角是怎么变成一只脚的。”

En: Stop taking this abuse. YOU. SOLVED. THE. CASE.
Zh: 别再忍受这种羞辱了。你-把-案子-破了！

En: Don't tell him about the phasmid. He *will not* believe it. IT. DIDN'T. HAPPEN.
Zh: 不要跟他说竹节虫的事。他*不会*相信的。这件事-没有-发生！

En: This sounds hysterical, Harry. What did you *do* on that island? What happened to you?
Zh: “听起来像是癔症，哈里。你在岛上*做了*什么？你到底怎么了？”

En: Actually -- you didn't.
Zh: “事实上——你没有。”

En: Female? What makes you think so?
Zh: “雌性？你为什么会这么想？”

En: Its nervous system may be stored in its long limbs.
Zh: “它的神经系统可能储存在它修长的四肢里。”

En: It had gathered *items* in its nest: a helmet, a scope, and a passport.
Zh: “它把*东西*都收藏在自己的巢穴里：一个头盔，一个瞄准镜，还有一本护照。”

En: I think it emits a chemical that makes it look even more like the reeds.
Zh: “我想它会释放一种化学物质，让它看起来更像芦苇。”

En: Hmm, yes. That would be a kairomone -- a pheromone that's seemingly beneficial to the host. It usually stimulates the affected nervous system -- not a human's, of course, but perhaps a predator's?
Zh: “嗯，是的。那可能是利它素——一种似乎对宿主有益的费洛蒙。通常会刺激受影响的神经系统——当然了，不是人类的，不过有可能是捕食者的？”

En: It had gathered *items* in its nest: a helmet and a scope.
Zh: “它把*东西*都收藏在自己的巢穴里：一个头盔和一个瞄准镜。”

En: As in cloning itself? What makes you think so?
Zh: “就像自己克隆一样？你为什么这么想？”

En: You had to see it... It had the subdued colours of a female. And the nesting behaviour too, I think.
Zh: “你真的要去看看……它有种雌性柔和的颜色。我想，还有筑巢行为吧。”

En: It was definitely female.
Zh: 它绝对是雌性。

En: Incredible... Were there eggs in the nest?
Zh: “真是难以置信……巢穴里有蛋吗？”

En: Not as far as I could see. There were other things there, though... He turns to you.
Zh: “反正我没有看见。不过，里面还有些别的东西……”他转向你。

En: (Conclude.) "It had mandibles that looked like hair. And it was completely white on the inside."
Zh: （总结。）“它的上颚看起来像头发一样。而且里面是纯白的。”

En: Yes, but also reed-coloured -- beige and brown, a little green -- on the outside. After unfolding from a single stalk, it still retained parts that looked like reed tufts on its limbs.
Zh: “是的。还有芦苇的颜色——米黄和棕色，还有一点绿——在外面。从一根茎杆上展开之后，它的四肢上还保留着看起来像是芦苇丛毛的一部分。

En: Like a cephalopod's? Phasmids, I think, only have nerves in their heads and abdomens, though... there is a correlation between invertebrate size and intelligence. Was it...?
Zh: “就像头足类动物吗？我想可能是竹节虫，只不过神经系统储存在头部和腹部……无脊椎动物的大小和智力存在着关联性。那它……？”

En: Actually, you know -- this would indicate it was a male. This is far from anything in my field, but I think such nests are called 'bowers'. They are for attracting mates.
Zh: “事实上，你知道吗——这可能意味着它是一个雄性。这跟我的研究领域实在是相去甚远，不过我觉得这类巢穴被称为‘凉亭’。是用来吸引伴侣的。”

En: Bowers are built by males of species who can't afford colourful mating displays physically -- this one *was* plain coloured...
Zh: 凉亭是由雄性物种建造的，它们的身体无法展示鲜艳的求偶表态——这一个*是*素色的……

En: I still think it was female.
Zh: “我还是觉得它是雌性。”

En: It could have been male, actually...
Zh: “其实，真有可能是雄性……”

En: Of course. As I said, I'm only guessing. *I* didn't see it. It must be robust, if it can move *that*, he points to the helmet you're wearing, "with its limbs."
Zh: “当然。我也说过了。我只是猜测。*我*没有亲眼看到。如果能移动*那个*的话，它肯定很健壮，”他指着你的头盔说到，“而且用的是它的四肢。”

En: Of course. As I said, I'm only guessing. *I* didn't see it. He pauses, turning something over in his head. "It must be robust, if it can move a whole helmet with its limbs..."
Zh: “当然。我也说过了。我只是猜测。*我*没有亲眼看到。”他停顿了一下，在脑子里反复思考着。“如果能用四肢移动一个头盔的话，它肯定很健壮……”

En: It told me.
Zh: “它告诉我的。”

En: Just a hunch.
Zh: “只是一种直觉。”

En: Well -- then it wouldn't matter if it's male or female. The bower would just be rudimentary behaviour from before the parthenogenetic mutation.
Zh: “呃——那它到底是雄性或者雌性就不重要了。凉亭可能只是孤雌生殖突变之前的退化行为。”

En: That makes sense, yes.
Zh: 说的有道理，没错。

En: Interesting... Then it is *especially* vulnerable to disease. A single strain of bacteria could wipe out the entire species. We're *probably* talking conservation efforts here... He looks around, quickly assessing the coast.
Zh: “有意思……那它肯定*特别*容易患病。一点细菌就能毁灭整个种族。我们*可能*说的是保护措施……”他四下看了看，飞快地评估了一下海岸的环境。

En: Very interesting. He looks around, quickly assessing the coast. "Such organisms are extremely vulnerable to disease. A single strain of bacteria could wipe out the whole species. We're probably looking at conservation efforts here..."
Zh: “非常有意思。”他四下看了看，飞快地评估了一下海岸的环境。“那它肯定很容易患病。一点细菌就能毁灭整个种族。我们可能需要保护措施……”

En: It must be robust if it can move a helmet with its limbs... He trails off, lost in thought.
Zh: “如果它能用四肢移动这个头盔的话，肯定很就健壮……”他的声音越来越小，陷入了沉思。

En: The perpetrator seemed intoxicated somehow. Like an addict. It's just a hunch, but...
Zh: “凶手似乎很沉醉的样子。就像上瘾。这只是我的直觉，不过……”

En: There are species of bees that, under the influence of kairomones, take wasp larvae to their hives. Ants do the same with aphids thinking they're... he stops. "Do you think this is how it's stayed hidden?"
Zh: “有一种蜜蜂，在利它素的影响下，会把黄蜂幼虫带回它们的巢穴。蚂蚁也会这样对待蚜虫，认为它们是……”他停了下来。“你觉得它就是这样隐藏起来的吗？”

En: Nothing is off the table, but -- I want to stress this -- the find does not have to be connected to the case. The case is 100% prosecutable -- without *any* kairomones.
Zh: “没有什么不可能的，不过——我想强调一点——这个发现跟这个案子不一定有关联。这个案子100%可以提起公诉——没有*任何*利它素。”

En: Of course, lieutenant. Of course. We should treat the case and the phasmid as completely separate from each other. People are not going to... He shakes his head.
Zh: “当然，警督。当然了。我们应该把这个案子和竹节虫完全分割开来。大家是不会……”他摇摇头。

En: They're not going to go for this speculation in the Constabulatory.
Zh: “他们在警局里是不会拥护这种推测的。”

En: It was a sensing entity. There was something there.
Zh: “它是一个传感实体。那里有些什么。”

En: Intelligent? It behaved like an insect.
Zh: “智力？它的行为跟昆虫一样啊。”

En: To me it seemed to have... *some* character.
Zh: “在我看来，它似乎有……*某种*特性。”

En: He nods. "At that size, this creature would have a lot of surface area to put neurons into. It's basic geometry."
Zh: 他点点头。“那种大小的话，这个生物拥有大量的表面面积来存放神经元。它基本上是个几何结构。”

En: Of course. I'm getting ahead of myself. Stick insects have primitive nervous systems. Still -- this creature would have a lot of surface area to put neurons into...
Zh: “当然。我有点太超前了。竹节虫拥有原始的神经系统。不过——这个生物拥有大量的表面面积来存放神经元……”

En: Incredible... he repeats, turning to Vicquemare. "The PR value of this is exceptional. 'Cop Discovers New Species.' Maybe even: 'Discovers the Insulindian Phasmid.' No... That's too much."
Zh: “难以置信……”他一边重复着，一边转向维克玛。“它的公关价值是非凡的。‘警察发现新物种。’甚至是：‘伊苏林迪竹节虫大发现。’不。那样有点太过了。”

En: This would really help with some of the... *problems* we've been having.
Zh: “这样可能真的能帮我们处理一些……眼下的*问题*。”

En: Absolutely -- this is great. This does not say 'vigilante murderers' to me at all. This says: science, news, human interest. He smiles. "You know, it's a really good thing you have that photo."
Zh: “绝对的——这真是太棒了。在我看来，这根本不是在说‘义务警员杀手’。这是：科学，新闻，人类的利益。”他笑了。“你知道的，你能拍到那张相片真是太好了。”

En: Without it... He shakes his head.
Zh: “没了它……”他摇摇头。

En: Incredible... he repeats, turning to Vicquemare. "It's a toughie that you don't have a photo. This would look very, very flashy in the papers. None of it says *vigilante murderers* to me at all. Great PR."
Zh: “难以置信……”他一边重复着，一边转向维克玛。“没有相片就有点困难了。出现在文件上的话，看起来会非常、非常的华而不实。在我看来，这根本不是在说*义务警员杀手*。而是很好的公关宣传。”

En: I tried to... but I only got a blur.
Zh: “我试过了……不过有点模糊。”

En: Ouch...
Zh: 哎哟……

En: We can still work 'Cop Discovers New Species' in there. I know a good guy in La Majeste. But only *after* the École Supérieure people find it. This *cannot* be done by fringe people.
Zh: “我们还能在‘警察发现新物种’上下功夫。我在玛耶斯塔认识一个很好的家伙。不过只能在高等学校的人发现它*之后*。边缘人群是*做不到*的。”

En: It needs to be white coats and glassware for this fly. We need professionals... He looks at the reeds.
Zh: “它需要白色外套和玻璃器皿。我们需要专业人士……”他看向芦苇丛。

En: In the mist-coloured distance over the water, nothing moves. No trace of it...
Zh: 在遥远的雾蒙蒙的水面上，没有任何东西在动。没有它的痕迹……

En: What do you mean?
Zh: “你是什么意思？”

En: I told them a police raid will sweep the church in two days. Which, by the way -- it will. If they have any brains they won't be producing in there.
Zh: “我告诉他们，警方将会在两天内对教堂发起突击搜查。顺便说一句——我们的确会这么做。如果他们有脑子的话，就不会在那里制造。”

En: Because I'm a police detective. And manufacturing drugs is *illegal*.
Zh: “因为我是一名警探。而且制毒是*非法*的。”

En: Why?
Zh: “为什么？”

En: Uhm... Okay then.
Zh: “呃……那好吧。”

En: Wait -- he tried to set up a drug lab?
Zh: “等等——他想建立一个毒品实验室？”

En: No. He just let some youths set up a club in the church. They *thought* they could produce in there. They won't. The building was abandoned. It was an okay idea -- better than having them out on the ice.
Zh: “不。他只是让一群年轻人在教堂里建了个一家夜店。他们*以为*自己可以在那里制毒，但是不会的。那栋建筑废弃了。这个主意其实还好——总比让他们待在冰天雪地里的好。”

En: Yes -- it's very okay.
Zh: “是的——这样挺好的。”

En: He's really softening it up there.
Zh: 他是真的软化了许多。

En: Wait -- when did you do this?
Zh: “等等——你什么时候做的？”

En: When you were out.
Zh: “你出去的时候。”

En: What? He cups his ear -- the wind blows. "It sounded like you set up a drug lab!"
Zh: “什么？”他竖起耳朵——起风了。“听起来你是想建立一个毒品实验室啊！”

En: What was that? He cups his ear -- the wind blows. "It sounded like you set up a night club in the church."
Zh: “什么鬼？”他竖起耳朵——起风了。“听起来你在教堂里开了一家夜店。”

En: I didn't. It's the wind. You misheard.
Zh: “我没有。是风。你听错了。”

En: Yeah. *And* a night club. In the church. It was a huge operation to set it up.
Zh: “是啊。*还有*一家夜店。在教堂里。那可是个超级大工程。”

En: Yeah, and the club is called *No Truce with the Furies*.
Zh: “是啊，而且那家夜店叫*绝不休战*。”

En: Yeah, and the club is called *Revachol West*.
Zh: “是啊，而且那家夜店叫*瑞瓦肖西部*。”

En: Yeah, and the club is called *The Return*.
Zh: “是啊，而且那家夜店叫*归来*。”

En: Yeah, and the club is called *Disco Elysium*.
Zh: “是啊，而且那家夜店叫*极乐迪斯科*。”

En: Yeah! I did some kids a solid. Turned their lives around.
Zh: “哦耶！我帮了那些孩子一个忙。改变了他们的生活。”

En: Yeah! And I discovered a hitherto unexplored entroponetical phenomenon in there too -- a two-millimetre hole in the world.
Zh: “哦耶！而且我还在那里发现了一个迄今为止还未被探索过的灰域学现象——世界上有一个2毫米的洞。”

En: Yeah! I reinvigorated the local nightlife.
Zh: “哦耶！我复兴了本地的夜生活。”

En: That's great! *Night club owner* is a great new career -- because you're *done* as a police officer.
Zh: “真是太棒了！*夜店老板*是个很不错的新职业——因为你的警察生涯已经*结束*了。”

En: It wasn't the fucking wind! You said you started a drug lab. He takes a moment to collect himself. "Fine. I don't care. You're done as a cop -- become a polonium dealer for all I care."
Zh: “根本不是什么该死的风！你说你要建立一间毒品实验室。”他花了一点时间让自己镇定下来。“好吧。我不在乎。你的警察生涯结束了——你就当个钋贩子吧，反正与我无关。”

En: You know -- it might have been a *bad* idea to tell him that. Unless you want to be a drug baron and not a cop, of course...
Zh: 你知道吗——告诉他可能是个*坏*主意。当然了，除非你想当一个大毒枭，而不是警察……

En: Hmm...
Fuck it. Fine. I don't care. Your life as a cop is over -- become a polonium dealer for all I care.
Zh: “该死的。好吧。我不在乎。你的警察生涯结束了——你就当个钋贩子吧，反正与我无关。”

En: Stop squealing on yourself. Cuno *needs* to get out of this shithole. He turns to Vicquemare. "Pig's talking whack to impress you. It didn't go down like that. He done good. Tell them!"
Zh: “别再告发你自己了。坤诺*需要*离开这个鬼地方。”他转向维克玛。“猪猡说这么重是为了打动你。没有那回事。他做的很好。告诉他们！”

En: I don't care what your drug lab is called... He calms himself. "Fuck it. You're done as a cop -- become a polonium dealer for all I care."
Zh: “我不在乎你的毒品实验室叫什么名字……”他让自己镇定下来。“去你妈的。你的警察生涯结束了——你就当个钋贩子吧，反正与我无关。”

En: That's great! *Entroponaut* is a great new career for you -- *after* police officer. I don't care. Go live in the fucking pale.
Zh: “那太好了！*灰域学家*为你来说是个很不错的新职业——在警察*之后*。我不在乎。你他妈活在灰域里吧。”

En: You turned a church into a night club -- the *kids* are probably shooting up in there... What else did you do? Desecrate the altar? Shit in the chancel?
Zh: “你把一间教堂变成了夜店——*孩子*们可能会在那里注射毒品……你还做了什么？亵渎圣坛？在祭坛里拉屎？”

En: Get off the church-shit. It's making you sound crazy.
Zh: “别再提教堂什么的鬼话了。让你听起来更疯子一样。”

En: This isn't going to change a lot of minds, Harry.
Zh: 这样不会改变很多人的想法，哈里。

En: What was that? He cups his ear -- the wind blows. "It sounded like you set up a night club in the church."
Zh: “什么？”他竖起耳朵——起风了。“听起来你是想在教堂里开一家夜店啊。”

En: Yeah, I reinvigorated the local nightlife.
Zh: “是啊，我复兴了本地的夜生活。”

En: Yeah! I did some kids a solid. Turned their lives around.
Zh: “哦耶！我帮了那些孩子一个忙。改变了他们的生活。”

En: Yeah! And I discovered a hitherto unexplored entroponetical phenomenon in there too -- a two-millimetre hole in the world.
Zh: “哦耶！而且我还在那里发现了一个迄今为止还未被探索过的灰域学现象——世界上有一个2毫米的洞。”

En: Get a grip. No one cares about your *entroponetic adventures* right now.
Zh: “你控制一点。现在没人在乎你的*灰域大冒险*。”

En: That's great! *Entroponaut* is a great new career for you -- *after* police officer. I don't care. Go live in the pale.
Zh: “那太好了！*灰域学家*为你来说是个很不错的新职业——在警察*之后*。我不在乎。你他妈活在灰域里吧。”

En: Four kids were living in a tent on the ice. They were going to drown when it melted. It's not optimal, but the building *was* abandoned. So he put them in there. It's okay.
Zh: “四个孩子住在冰面上的一顶帐篷里。等到冰层融化，他们都会淹死的。这不是最理想的选择，不过那栋建筑*是*废弃的。所以他把他们带到那里去了。这样挺好的。”

En: It's not *that* okay. Get off this subject. Now.
Zh: 这样并没有*那么*好。别谈这个话题了。马上住嘴。

En: He shrugs. "I don't know what a 'Doomed Commercial Area' is."
Zh: 他耸耸肩。“我不知道什么是‘诅咒商业区’。”

En: Rue de Saint-Ghislaine 10. A commercial building where all businesses go bankrupt. I looked into it.
Zh: “圣吉莱纳路10号。那是一栋商业建筑，里面的所有企业都破产了。我调查了一下。”

En: Nothing. It's not important.
Zh: “没什么。这一点也不重要。”

En: Yeah, honestly -- it doesn't sound too important. Since it's not connected to the case -- or a giant living organism.
Zh: “是啊，说实在的——听起来没什么重要的。因为它跟案子没什么关联——或者是一个巨大的生物体。”

En: *Why*? That's not what you were supposed to do here.
Zh: “*为什么*？那可不是你来这里该做的事。”

En: This pig *helps* people, okay? He's a fuckin' handy helper, he does that shit. He finds insects and solves side-shit. It's his style. Side-style.
Zh: “这个猪猡在*帮助*别人，好吗？他是个该死的好帮手，所以才会做那种破事。他发现那个昆虫，还解决了一些什么狗屁支线任务。这是他的风格。支线风格。”

En: There was a *fridge* we needed. And a possible witness. He was just chasing a lead and ended up advising a local shopkeeper -- it was okay.
Zh: “我们需要那里的一台*冰箱*。还有一个可能的目击证人。他只是在追踪一条线索，最后还给本地一家店主提供了一点建议——这样挺好的。”

En: It's not what you were *sent* to do here.
Zh: “你被*派到*这里来，不是干这个的。”

En: There was a possible witness in there. And it was close to the crime scene. He was just chasing a lead and ended up advising a local shopkeeper -- it was okay.
Zh: “那里有个可能的目击证人。而且离犯罪现场也很近。他只是在追踪一条线索，最后还给本地一家店主提供了一点建议——这样挺好的。”

En: Jean -- it *is* his style.
Zh: “让——这*的确*是他的风格。”

En: It's *definitely* your style to solve *side-shit*.
Zh: 解决*支线任务*什么的，*绝对*是你的风格。

En: Jean -- it's his style. He does side cases. I'm sure it was important enough. Call it community outreach.
Zh: “让——这是他的风格。他是会做支线任务。我肯定它是足够重要的。就当做是社区服务吧。”

En: It's not what he was sent here to do. He was sent here to solve a murder -- not look into commercial areas.
Zh: “他被派过来不是干这个的。他来是为了破获一起凶杀案——而不是调查什么商业区。”

En: I'm 100% sure it didn't *turn out* to be that. You know, cut the amateur entroponetic two-millimetre-hole shit -- this isn't Paradox B. We're a police force.
Zh: “我100%肯定*结果*不是那样的。你知道的，别说2毫米的灰域小洞什么的鬼话了——这不是悖论B。我们是警察。”

En: No, it didn't -- it didn't turn out to be entroponetical *again*. Enough with two millimetre holes and the giant bugs -- this isn't Paradox B. We're a police force.
Zh: “不，不是的——结果不会*又是*什么灰域啊。两毫米的洞啊，大昆虫什么的真是够了——这不是悖论B。我们是警察。”

En: Paradox B is a fringe science magazine published in Graad. Its mission is to explain theories like telekinesis and intraisolary pale, before they get out of hand.
Zh: 悖论B是格拉德发行的一本边缘科学杂志。它的使命是解释类似心里遥感和跨洲灰域之类的理论，在它失去控制之前。

En: What were you even doing in some commercial area? Your *job* was to solve a murder, not *Martinaise*.
Zh: “你跑到商业区去做什么？你的*工作*是破获一起凶杀案，不是*马丁内斯*。”

En: No, it didn't -- it didn't turn out to be entroponetical *again*. Enough with the isolary-pale two-millimetre-hole-in-the-world line. This isn't Paradox B. We're a police force.
Zh: “不，不是的——结果不会*又是*什么灰域啊。什么跨洲灰域啊，世界上有个两毫米洞啊，真是够了——这不是悖论B。我们是警察。”

En: Yeah, I'm not going to waste more time with this -- whatever it was, it wasn't entroponetical, or a giant bug. Cut the Paradox B shit, we're a police force.
Zh: “是啊，我不会再多浪费时间了——不管是什么，肯定不是灰域，或者巨大的昆虫。悖论B之类的屁话就说到这里吧，我们可是警察。”

En: Lilianovich? The special consultant raises an eyebrow. "A Revolutionary matronym..."
Zh: “利连诺维奇？”特别顾问扬起眉头。“嗯。一个大革命时期的母姓……”

En: A Revolutionary matronym?
Zh: “大革命时期的母姓？”

En: I don't have time for this. Straight to the motive, please.
Zh: “我没时间研究这个。直接说动机吧。”

En: The custom started in Graad, where they have patronyms: Krasovich, Larsovich, etc. The revolutionaries saw this as a chauvinist atavism so they used matronyms, derived from the mother's name, instead.
Zh: “这种习俗来自格拉德，他们那里有一些父姓：克拉索维奇，拉索维奇，等等。革命分子觉得这是一种沙文主义的返祖现象，所以相反，他们会使用母姓，衍生于母亲的名字。”

En: This man would be Lilian's son -- Lilianovich. He turns to Vicquemare. "The custom was overturned after the revolutions failed, but not before making it to Revachol."
Zh: “这个男人是莉莲的儿子——利连诺维奇。”他转向维克玛。“大革命失败之后，这种习俗就被推翻了，不过传到瑞瓦肖之前还没有。”

En: Okay, Trant, thank you. I get it. Harry... He looks at you sternly. "No more giant insects -- you said you have a *motive*."
Zh: “好吧，特兰特，谢谢。我明白了。哈里……”他严肃地看着你。“不要再提什么巨大的昆虫了——你说你找到了*动机*。”

En: It *is* what a soldier of the ICM would be called.
Zh: “一个ICM的士兵*很可能*会叫这个名字。”

En: This man's mother was Lilian. He's Lilian's son -- Lilianovich. The custom was overturned after the Revolution failed, but not before it made it to Revachol.
Zh: “这个男人的母亲叫莉莲。他是莉莲的儿子——利连诺维奇。大革命失败之后，这种习俗就被推翻了，不过在传到瑞瓦肖之前没有。”

En: So... it *is* what a soldier of the ICM would be called.
Zh: “所以……一个ICM的士兵*很可能*会叫这个名字。”

En: Thank you, Trant. Thank you for that piece of cultural theory. He turns to you. "You said you have a *motive*."
Zh: “谢谢你，特兰特。感谢你那套文化理论。”他转向你。“你说你找到了*动机*。”

En: Of course. Excuse me. I just thought it was noteworthy.
Zh: “当然。请原谅。我只是觉得这一点值得注意。”

En: He killed the mercenary in an act of jealousy.
Zh: “他出于嫉妒杀死了雇佣兵。”

En: He killed the mercenary hoping to start a war between the company and the Union.
Zh: “他杀死雇佣兵，希望能借此挑起工会和公司之间的战争。”

En: He killed him in an act of rage induced by the phasmid's semiochemicals.
Zh: “他由于竹节虫的化学信息素诱发的愤怒杀了他。”

En: Actually, I'm not that sure if I *have* a motive. I had another thing...
Zh: “事实上，我不确定自己有没有*找到*动机。我还有一件事……”

En: He thinks this detail bolsters your straggler theory.
Zh: 他认为这个细节可以支撑你的逃兵理论。

En: He wasn't quite sure about the straggler before he heard this detail. It must have convinced him.
Zh: 在听到这个细节之前，他不太确定逃兵的事。肯定是这些细节说服了他。

En: This narrow-minded pig, he mumbles, drilling his temples with his index fingers. "I can't fucking..."
Zh: “这个心胸狭隘的猪猡，”他一边嘟囔，一边用食指抵住了太阳穴。“我不能……”

En: Cuno. Keep your head in the game.
Zh: “坤诺。集中眼下的任务。”

En: Alright, yeah. He bites his lip. "Cuno's in it."
Zh: “好吧，是啊。”他咬紧嘴唇。“坤诺知道的。”

En: He understands you *have* to nail this.
Zh: 他明白你*必须*搞定这件事。

En: Bring him to heel.
Zh: 让他乖乖就范。

En: Get the kid in line. You could use his help here.
Zh: 让男孩准备好。你可能需要他的帮助。

En: Yeah, suit. Check this shit out -- the merc was bangin' some chick he wanted to bang. So he shot him. Chick's called Klaasje.
Zh: “是啊，西装男。听好了——雇佣兵跟他想干的女人干起来了。所以他就杀了他。那个女人叫卡拉洁。”

En: Klaasje -- as in the suspect he let escape? From Kitsuragi's report?
Zh: “卡拉洁——不是那个他放跑的嫌疑人吗？曷城的报告里写的那个？”

En: Fucking snitch binoclard... He collects himself. "Yeah -- that chick. Get over it pig, she didn't do it. It was grandpa on the island. Merc was fuckin' her and he couldn't hack it. Cuno can hack it."
Zh: “他妈的，用望远镜偷窥……”他镇定下来。“是啊——那个女人。忘了这码事吧，猪猡，不是她干的。岛上那个老爷子干得。雇佣兵正在跟她鬼混，他不能忍受。坤诺就能忍。”

En: He also had political reasons.
Zh: “他还有政治方面的原因。”

En: He's a trained sniper. The weapon he used -- the ballistics match.
Zh: “他是个受过训练的狙击手。他用的武器——弹道是符合的。”

En: He's a trained sniper. The weapon he used is more than capable of making the shot.
Zh: “他是个受过训练的狙击手。他的武器要命中目标实在是绰绰有余。”

En: Yeah. Politics shit. My pig also connected, like... the weapon to him... He looks to you.
Zh: “是啊。政治之类的狗屁。我的猪猡也是有联系的，就像……那个武器……”他看着你。

En: Slam the weapon man, the murder weapon.
Zh: 把武器拿出来啊，老兄，那个凶器。

En: Okay. He rubs his temples. "And he'll confess? To the *prosecution* too?"
Zh: “好吧。”他揉了揉太阳穴。“他会认罪吗？也会向*检方*认罪吗？”

En: The state he's in now? I don't know. But *we* got a confession -- he confessed to us.
Zh: “按他现在的状态？我不知道。不过*我们*拿到一份供词了——他向我们认罪了。”

En: A detective *and* a civilian. Jean -- *and* the gun. He has it...
Zh: “一个警探*和*一个平民。让——*还有*那支枪。他做到了……”

En: I think once he's resuscitated -- yes. We got him talking once. He'll talk again.
Zh: “我觉得等他恢复知觉之后——是可以的。我们让他开过一次口。他还会再开口的。”

En: *Resuscitated* -- that sounds great...
Zh: “*恢复知觉*——听起来真是太棒了……”

En: Jean. He has it. No more cooperation needed. He had a civilian there for the confession -- this is doable.
Zh: “让。他做到了。不需要更多配合。他认罪的时候有一个平民在场——这是可行的。”

En: Yeah. Check this shit -- he's like some fucking old school warrior. Man From Hjelmdall shit. Only against rich people and... pederasts I think? Cuno doesn't know what a pederast is, Cuno's not a university...
Zh: “哦耶。听好了吧——他就像是那种保守的老战士。来自赫姆达尔的男人之类的狗屁。只不过他对抗的是有钱人和……基佬吧，我猜？坤诺不知道基佬是什么，坤诺没上过大学……”

En: But he did that shit. To get the Union fucks killed, so they'd get the other fucks killed. Boom! Giant kill-storm. Mastermind shit -- only, like, a really old mastermind who's fucking stupid.
Zh: “但就是他做的。为了让工会的那帮混账送命，这样他们就会把其他混账干掉。嘣！大杀戮风暴。幕后黑手之类的——只不过，怎么说呢，真是个蠢的要命的老幕后黑手。”

En: Okay. Mastermind.
Zh: “好吧。幕后黑手。”

En: Wait -- Jean. Was there *not* a giant kill-storm?
Zh: “等等——让。*不是*有一场巨大的杀戮风暴吗？”

En: He's not getting it.
Zh: 他没明白。

En: You were *just* up his asscrack for the mass murder shit. Now it's nothing? Why do you think that shit *happened?*
Zh: “你*刚刚*让他承认大屠杀什么的。现在又什么都不是了？你觉得为什么会*发生*这些破事？”

En: You ain't saying shit, because you don't got shit to say.
Zh: “你他妈什么也没说，是因为你他妈根本没什么好说的。”

En: Okay, Cuno -- okay. He rubs his temples, then turns to you. "And he'll confess? To *prosecution* too?"
Zh: “好吧，坤诺——好吧。”他揉了揉太阳穴，然后转向你。“所以他全招了？也会向*控方*认罪吗？”

En: He's a trained sniper. The weapon he used -- the ballistics match.
Zh: “他是个受过训练的狙击手。他用的武器——弹道是符合的。”

En: He's a trained sniper. The weapon he used is more than capable of making the shot.
Zh: “他是个受过训练的狙击手。他的武器要命中目标实在是绰绰有余。”

En: Yeah, like... the ballistics too, pig. We got him *knee deep* in popo shit.
Zh: “哦耶，就像……弹道学什么的，猪猡。我们让他*深陷*在警察的狗屎里。”

En: This left a mark. They can't deny it, son -- you got the bastard.
Zh: 它留下了一个标记。他们没办法否认，孩子——你抓住那个杂种了。

En: There. No one is saying anything. The silence agrees.
Zh: 看见没。没人说话。沉默就表示同意。

En: This is good. They can't deny it.
Zh: 这样很好。他们没办法否认。

En: Fucking... listen to him, pig! Grandpa's *deranged*. Cuno knows you don't believe this phasmid shit -- but he was hatin' rich people, some kind of *pederasts* too... fuckin' hating *everything*.
Zh: “该死的……听他说话，猪猡！老头子*精神错乱*了。坤诺知道你们不相信竹节虫什么的——但他痛恨有钱人，还有一些*基佬*……他妈的，他痛恨*一切*。”

En: Worse than Cuno's violent dad. Shakes like a pig, eyes like saucers. Wavin' at nothing. That's some dark shit -- and he's been with that bug for like -- ever. Don't close your mind to this shit!
Zh: “比坤诺那个暴力的老爹还糟糕。像头猪一样抖个不停，眼睛像茶碟。手到处乱挥。那些都是很黑暗的狗屁玩意——而且他跟那个昆虫在一起待了，差不多——一辈子了吧。不要把自己搞得那么封闭好不好！”

En: Phasmid... Jude, I think we should just go and write Harry a station call. It's getting...
Zh: “竹节虫……茱蒂，我觉得我们应该给哈里发一张警局传唤通知。这有点……”

En: Yeah, okay, I get it -- people develop fucked up psyches in solitude. If he's been hiding for fifty *years* it's understandable.
Zh: “是啊，好吧，我明白了——人一孤独就会得精神病。如果他在那里隐蔽了*50年*的话，倒是可以理解。”

En: Yeah, he was like a fuckin' assassin, tell him...
Zh: “是啊，他他妈的就像个刺客，快告诉他……”

En: Listen -- he was acting violent. Scatterbrained. In a *fragile* mental state.
Zh: “听着——他表现的很暴力。浮躁。处于一种很*脆弱*的精神状态。”

En: He's a trained sniper. The weapon he used -- the ballistics match.
Zh: “他是个受过训练的狙击手。他用的武器——弹道是符合的。”

En: He's a trained sniper. The weapon he used is more than capable of making the shot.
Zh: “他是个受过训练的狙击手。他的武器要命中目标实在是绰绰有余。”

En: Hah!
Zh: 哈！

En: Okay-okay... He rubs his temples. "Will he confess? To *prosecution*? No phasmid weirdness, just straight up confess?"
Zh: “好吧好吧……”他揉了揉太阳穴。“他会认罪吗？能对*检方*认罪吗？没有什么离奇的竹节虫，就直接认罪？”

En: Pig, what the fuck is wrong with you?! Why you choking? Lay it on them! We have it!
Zh: “猪猡，你他妈有什么毛病啊？！你怎么不说话了。告诉他们啊！我们做到了！”

En: No, detective -- we *have* a motive... He gestures for you to speak up.
Zh: “不，警探——我们*有*动机……”他朝你比了个手势，示意你说下去。

En: Of course. There *is* no motive... He sighs.
Zh: “当然了。*没有*动机……”他叹了口气。

En: Take the advice.
Zh: 接受建议。

En: Klaasje -- as in the suspect Lieutenant Kitsuragi brought in? I've read his reports -- don't fuck with me.
Zh: “卡拉洁——就是曷城警督拘留的那个嫌疑人吗？我看过他的报告了——别想骗我。”

En: Snitch binoclard... He collects himself. "Yeah. Klaasje -- that chick. But she didn't do it. It was this old fuck. Grandpa on the island. Merc was fucking her and he couldn't hack it. Cuno can hack it."
Zh: “用望远镜偷窥……”他镇定下来。“是啊，卡拉洁——那个女人。不过不是她做的。是那个老混账。岛上那个老爷子。雇佣兵正在跟她鬼混，他不能忍受。坤诺就能忍。”

En: Jealousy? He's what -- eighty? *Ninety*? Didn't you say he's been in hiding since the Revolution?
Zh: “嫉妒？他多大了——80岁？*90*岁？你不是说他从大革命时期就开始躲藏了吗？”

En: A strange psychosexual fixation. Aggravated -- possibly -- by proximity to the phasmid and its chemicals. He himself gave a political reason -- said he had killed an enemy combatant.
Zh: “一种奇怪的性心理异常依恋。由于接近竹节虫和它的化学物质——可能是这样——而恶化了。他自己给出了一个政治理由——说他杀了一个敌方战士。”

En: Jealousy... I thought this Lilianovich was an old man. To have been hiding for fifty years... seventy-something?
Zh: “嫉妒……我以为这个利连诺维奇是个老人。一直躲藏了50年……他都七十多了吧？”

En: It's a clean win.
Zh: “这是一场干净利落的胜利。”

En: It's my masterpiece. They'll teach this in cop-school.
Zh: “这是我的杰作。他们会在警察学校教这个的。”

En: I did all I could. Every second was a struggle.
Zh: “我已经尽力了。每一秒都在奋斗。”

En: I'm still not *completely* satisfied with it. It could be just a *little* neater.
Zh: “我还是不算*完全*满意。本来可以再利落*一点*的。”

En: He nods. "A strange psychosexual fascination. The result of spending all this time in solitude, on the islands of this bay... And trauma too. He himself gave a political reason. In his mind, he had killed an enemy combatant."
Zh: 他点点头。“一种奇怪的性心理异常依恋。一个人孤独地过了那么久，生活在海湾的一座小岛上……而且还有心理创伤。他自己倒是给出了一个政治理由。在他的脑海里，他杀了一个敌方战士。”

En: And it worked? He got a war going?
Zh: “成功了吗？他成功引起一场战争了吗？”

En: Yes -- until we stopped it. The lieutenant is quick to correct him. "He saw the mercenary as an *enemy combatant* -- there's plenty for prosecution to pick from, as far as motive is concerned."
Zh: “是的——直到我们阻止了它。”警督快速纠正了他。“他把雇佣兵看作是*敌方战士*——就动机而言，检方有很多种选择。”

En: Also -- we have a sniper's nest with full view of the room in which the mercenary died. Right on the island. *And* two officers on the scene that Mr. Dros *confessed* to.
Zh: “而且——我们还发现了一处狙击手掩体，能清晰又完整地看到雇佣兵死去的那个房间。就在那座岛上。*而且*，德罗斯先生*认罪*的时候，还有两名警官在场。”

En: *Possibly* induced, he corrects you. "But even without that -- this man spent fifty years on the islands in the bay. In solitude. Loathing what Revachol has become. There's plenty for prosecution to pick from in terms of motive."
Zh: “是个*可能*的诱因，”他纠正了你。“不过即便没有那个——这个男人在海湾的一座小岛上生活了50年。独自一人。憎恨瑞瓦肖现在的样子。就动机而言，检方可以有很多种选择。”

En: Also -- we have ballistics from the gun, matching the bullet found in the dead mercenary's head. *And* two officers on the scene that Mr. Dros *confessed* to.
Zh: “而且——我们还研究了那支枪的弹道，跟死去雇佣兵脑袋里发现的子弹是相匹配的。*而且*，德罗斯先生*认罪*的时候，还有两名警官在场。”

En: Fine. Brilliant theory. A real masterpiece. You'll get a station call and you can tell all about it -- to some *other* officer. We'll send the coast guard to the island. Maybe they'll find your giant insect too.
Zh: “很好。很棒的理论。一个真正的杰作。你会收到一份警局通知单，你可以把这一切全部说出来——给*其他*警察*听。我们会派海岸巡逻队上岛。也许他们也会找到你说的那只大昆虫。”

En: Cryptozoology? You're giving me *cryptozoology*? Trant was feeling *pity* for you -- you use the chance to go *full crypto*!
Zh: “神秘动物学？你居然跟我讲*神秘动物学*？特兰特很*同情*你——你干脆利用这个机会*神秘到底*了是吗！”

En: Oh, it's *way* more than that.
Zh: 哦，还*远远*不止那些呢。

En: It's more than that -- a perfect folding mechanism. Like the phasmid.
Zh: “不仅如此——它是一个完美的折叠机制。就像竹节虫一样。”

En: Way, *way* more.
Zh: 远远，*远远*不止。

En: It's *way* more than that.
Zh: 还*远远*不止那些呢。

En: It's *way* more than that. It will win me Dora back.
Zh: “还*远远*不止那些呢。它会帮我把朵拉赢回来。”

En: *Perfect folding mechanism*... He rolls his eyes. "Get over yourself, Harry -- I can still smell the booze on the wind."
Zh: “*完美的折叠机制*……”他翻了个白眼。“别这么自负了，哈里——我还能闻到风里飘来的酒味呢。”

En: That's not how personal relationships work, Harry. You found a straggler. The first since the Thirties. Kudos. But that doesn't *change* anything.
Zh: “人际关系不是这样运转的，哈里。你发现了一个逃兵。30年代以来的第一个。值得称赞。不过这也*改变*不了什么。”

En: It doesn't hide the smell of booze on the wind either. He buttons his jacket.
Zh: 他扣起夹克。“而且，它也没能掩盖风里飘来的酒味。”

En: *Masterpiece*... He rolls his eyes. "Get over yourself, Harry -- I can still smell the booze on the wind."
Zh: “*杰作*……”他翻了个白眼。“别这么自负了，哈里——我还能闻到风里飘来的酒味呢。”

En: Get over yourself -- you're not a *perfectionist*. You're a cop and you did a good job. With a lot of help from Lieutenant Kitsuragi.
Zh: “别这么自负了——你不是一个*完美主义者*。你是一个警察，而且干得不错。得到了曷城警督的很多帮助。”

En: And none of this can hide the smell of booze on the wind. He buttons his jacket.
Zh: 他扣起夹克。“而且，这一切都不能掩盖风里飘来的酒味。”

En: God dammit, doesn't it ever *leave*?! It *is* there! Like, in your bones or something...
Zh: 该死的，它难道就不会*散开*吗？！它*就在*那里！就像是，深入骨髓或者什么……

En: It will pass -- in time.
Zh: 它会散去的——迟早的事。

En: God dammit -- it *is* bad. Even you can smell it.
Zh: 该死——*的确*很糟糕。你都能闻到。

En: It's just a little celebration.
Zh: 这只是个小小的庆祝活动。

En: I'm pulling the plug on this *straggler* thing. He shakes his head. "You're gonna get a station call to explain what happened. Coast guard is gonna scan the island. That's it."
Zh: “我要终止这个*逃兵*的话题了。”他摇摇头。“你会收到一份警局通知书，解释到底发生了什么事。海岸巡逻队会上岛搜索。这件事到此为止。”

En: Jude, he's drunk. It's cold. I'm fucking freezing. Let's get him to the station when he's sobered up. In two weeks or something.
Zh: “茱蒂，他喝醉了。这里很冷。我他妈都快冻僵了。等他清醒之后，我们把他带回警局。大概两周左右吧。”

En: Cryptozoology? You're giving me *cryptozoology*? You say you have a motive and you use the chance to go *full crypto* on me!
Zh: “神秘动物学？你居然跟我讲*神秘动物学*？你说你发现勒动机，然后就干脆利用这个机会*神秘到底*了是吗！”

En: Jean, maybe... She stops and sighs.
Zh: “让，也许……”她停下来，叹了口气。

En: That's it. The verdict.
Zh: 到此为止。裁决结果下来了。

En: The iron smell of blood rises to your mouth.
Zh: 你的嘴巴里尝到一股血液的铁锈味。

En: He comes to a sudden, abrupt stop.
Zh: 他突然停了下来。

En: There's a fucking FOUR-TON MANTIS on the island.
Zh: “那个岛上他妈的有一支巨大的四条腿的螳螂。”

En: Oh yeah, it's going to get wacko-natural. Tell him.
Zh: “哦耶，肯定会超逼自然。快告诉他。”

En: No -- I don't *have* to believe you made a *zoological discovery*. That is not a must. And even if you did... you're a cop. Who cares?
Zh: “不——我*没必要*相信你做出了什么*动物学上的大发现*。这不是必须的。而且就算是……你是个警察。谁在乎呢？”

En: Okay. We'll see about it when we get coast guard on the island.
Zh: “好吧。等海岸巡逻队上岛之后，我们再来考虑这件事。”

En: You know, Harry -- if I may interrupt again -- it would help if you had *evidence*. Any proof -- and I'd play ball here. The PR potential would be quite something for the RCM.
Zh: “你知道吗，哈里——如果我可以再打断一下——如果你有*证据*的话，应该会很有帮助。任何证据——我都可以合作。对于RCM的公关宣传来说，这可是个很好的机会。”

En: You know, Harry -- if I may interrupt -- it would help if you had *evidence*. Any proof -- and I'd play ball here. The PR potential would be quite something for the RCM.
Zh: “你知道吗，哈里——如果我可以稍微打断一下——如果你有*证据*的话，应该会很有帮助。任何证据——我都可以合作。对于RCM的公关宣传来说，这可是个很好的机会。”

En: It emits a chemical that makes it look *more* like the reeds.
Zh: “它会释放一种化学物质，让它看起来*更像*芦苇。”

En: I know things about it. I think it reproduces by parthenogenesis.
Zh: “我知道一些事情。我认为它是通过单性生殖繁衍的。”

En: Its nervous system is stored in its *limbs*.
Zh: “它的神经系统储存在修长的*四肢*里。”

En: It was completely white on the inside, but brown and beige on the outside. Like reeds.
Zh: “里面完全是白色的，不过外面是棕色和米黄色的。就像芦苇一样。”

En: They're not going to consider more than one piece of evidence -- choose wisely.
Zh: 他们不会考虑一个以上的证据——选择的时候要明智一点。

En: Put the best proof forth. As solid as you've got.
Zh: 拿出最好的证据。像你一样可靠的证据。

En: Some kind of a... what were they called? A bower? Yes. Things collected for a mating display. This would indicate a male. But... I don't know of *insects* displaying bowery behaviour.
Zh: “某种……它们叫什么来着？一个凉亭？是的。为了求偶表态而收集东西。这可能意味着它是一个雄性。不过……我不知道*昆虫*会表现出俗丽的行为。”

En: Suit, we have a *shitload* of proof. Spin it on them, pig!
Zh: “西装男，我们他妈的有*一堆*证据。拿给他们看看，猪猡！”

En: Well, that's not exactly *proof*. It's a theory. But -- it *is* interesting.
Zh: “呃，那并不能算是*证据*。这是一种理论。不过——*的确*很有意思。”

En: And how do you know that?
Zh: “那你又是怎么知道的？”

En: That's not *proof*, it's a description. But -- befitting a stick insect. If it's camouflaged to look like the reeds then it would have to be pretty large.
Zh: “那不叫*证据*，那是描述。不过——很符合竹节虫的样子。如果它能伪装成芦苇的样子，那肯定体型很大。”

En: Yeah, and it had like these... tufts of reeds on it. Even after it unfolded. And bitch -- it unfolded like crazy! It was fucking beautiful.
Zh: “哦耶，而且它还有那种……芦苇丛在上面。甚至展开之后也有。还有——他妈的展开的时候简直是疯了！太他妈漂亮了！”

En: Large?! The kid slaps his forehead in disbelief. "Gimp, it was fucking *gigantic*!"
Zh: “大？！”男孩难以置信地拍了怕额头。“那他妈的是*巨大*好吗！”

En: Fucking gimp... it's more than *interesting*. Cuno's pig's laying down science here. Shit's legit.
Zh: “该死的噪音……它远远不止*有趣*好吗。坤诺的猪猡重新定义了科学。这破玩意可是合法的。”

En: Okay. One question -- how do you know that?
Zh: “好吧。一个问题——你是怎么知道的？”

En: I examined the insect. Up close.
Zh: “我检查过那只昆虫。近距离的。”

En: I approached it and had a conversation with it. We talked.
Zh: “我靠近它，跟它说话。我们聊了几句。”

En: Intuition. Turns out I have a wide intellectual base in here. (Point to your head.)
Zh: “直觉。原来我这里有很广阔的知识基础。”（指着你的脑袋。）

En: You did not -- under any circumstances -- *talk* to it.
Zh: 您没有——在任何情况下——跟它*说过*话。

En: What you're giving us is not news. It's not proof, it's not even an observation. It's a cryptozoological factoid. You can get it from Paradox B, Aquarius, any *mystery* station... He stops. "Here's *my* theory."
Zh: “你跟我们说的不是新闻。这不是证据，甚至算不上观察。这是神秘动物学的虚构陈述。你可能是从悖论B，水瓶座，任何*神秘*电台那里听来的……”他停了下来。“*我的*理论是这样的。”

En: You experienced a *delirium hallucination*. It's typical of cognitive damage. From years of chronic alcoholism. You started *seeing shit* in the reeds -- and convinced this poor kid of it too.
Zh: “你经历了一种*精神错乱幻觉*。这是一种典型的认知损伤。由于多年的慢性酒精中毒引起的。你开始在芦苇丛里*看见*一些东西——而且还说服了这个可怜的孩子。”

En: You experienced a *delirium hallucination*. It's typical of cognitive damage. From chronic alcoholism. Which is what you have. So you started *seeing shit* in the reeds.
Zh: “你经历了一种*精神错乱幻觉*。这是一种典型的认知损伤。由于多年的慢性酒精中毒引起的。你的确有这个病。所以你开始在芦苇丛里*看见*一些东西。”

En: Maybe it's true?
Zh: 也许是真的呢？

En: No. It's not true. It was there. It was real. You remember every detail of its sounds, its movements, its presence...
Zh: 不。不是真的。它就在那里。它是真的。你记得每一个细节，它的声音，它的动作，它的存在……

En: Shit was there -- display the shit, pig. The shit! It's the proof.
Zh: “它就在那里——把那个狗屁玩意拿出来，猪猡。那个鬼东西！它就是证据。”

En: *This* is especially strange. (Show him the passport.)
Zh: “*这个*真的特别奇怪。”（把护照拿给他看。）

En: This was there. (Point to your head.)
Zh: “它就在那里。”（指着你的脑袋。）

En: This was there. (Show him the helmet.)
Zh: “它就在那里。”（把头盔拿给他看。）

En: It had taken this -- from the killer. (Show him the scope.)
Zh: “这是它拿走的——从凶手那里。”（把瞄准镜拿给他看。）

En: It's a scope. From a gun. Nothing about this even *remotely* proves the existence of a giant insect. Here's my theory, Harry.
Zh: “这是个瞄准镜。枪上的。这一切*基本*都不能证明一只巨大昆虫的存在。跟你说说我的理论吧，哈里。”

En: It's a helmet. From the victim. Nothing about this even *remotely* proves the existence of a giant insect. Here's my theory, Harry.
Zh: “这是个头盔。被害人的。这一切*基本*都不能证明一只巨大昆虫的存在。跟你说说我的理论吧，哈里。”

En: It's a passport. Waterlogged paper. Nothing about this even *remotely* proves the existence of a giant insect. Here's my theory, Harry.
Zh: “这是一本护照。是一张被水浸透的纸。这一切*基本*都不能证明一只巨大昆虫的存在。跟你说说我的理论吧，哈里。”

En: I *did* hallucinate a talking tie...
Zh: “我*确实*幻想出了一条会说话的领带……”

En: I *did* have a conversation with a corpse...
Zh: “我*确实*跟一具尸体说过话……”

En: The damage alcohol has done to my mind *is* extensive...
Zh: “酒精对我的大脑造成的伤害*实在*是太严重了……”

En: No. I know what I saw. It was *real*.
Zh: “不。我知道自己看见了什么。它是*真实存在*的。”

En: Maybe I got too deep into what the cryptozoologists were telling me...
Zh: “也许神秘动物学家告诉我的那些话，让我陷得太深了……”

En: Literal *cryptozoologists* are involved? That's it. No more phasmid-talk. There's no PR-value in delirium tremens.
Zh: “*神秘动物学家*也参与其中了？就到这里吧。不要再提什么竹节虫了。震颤性谵妄可没有什么公关价值。”

En: The tie's talking again -- that's it. No more phasmid-talk. There's no PR-value in delirium tremens.
Zh: “领带又说话了——就到这里吧。不要再提什么竹节虫了。震颤性谵妄可没有什么公关价值。”

En: With a corpse? That's it. No more phasmid-talk. There's no PR-value in delirium tremens.
Zh: “跟一具尸体说话？就到这里吧。不要再提什么竹节虫了。震颤性谵妄可没有什么公关价值。”

En: Plants turning into bugs *is* a typical hallucination. Arche-typical even, dating back to many ancient tribal societies.
Zh: “植物变成昆虫*是*很典型的幻觉。甚至很典型，可以追溯到很多古老的部落社会。”

En: No shit.
Zh: “这不是废话。”

En: Fucking... Cuno doesn't have a photo camera 'cause Cuno *is* fucking POOR, okay?! That sucks about the Cuno. So Cuno didn't take a fucking PHOTO. And Cuno didn't paint a fucking picture.
Zh: “该死的……坤诺没有照相机，因为坤诺他妈的*很穷*，好吗？！这他妈真是糟糕透了。所以坤诺他妈的没拍到相片。而且，坤诺他妈的也没有画画。”

En: He points to his skull. "But it's in my head. In here. Cuno's *eyes* took the picture. It's RIGHT FUCKING HERE. I can't BELIEVE you're not getting this..." He grinds his teeth.
Zh: 他指着自己的脑袋。“但是它就在我的脑袋里。就在这里。坤诺用*眼睛*拍下了相片。它他妈的就在这里。我真不相信你居然不明白……”他咬紧了牙关。

En: Cuno -- please. If it's on the island, then it will be seen again. Calm down...
Zh: “坤诺——拜托。如果它在岛上，那还会被看见的。冷静点……”

En: It will NEVER be seen again! It wasn't seen for a *hundred* years. Fuck Cuno and let's all pretend there was no miracle. We don't need a giant insect, everything is so *good* without it in this fuck-hole... He looks around.
Zh: “你们永远也看不到它了！它已经有*100*年没被人发现了。去他妈的吧，我们都假装没有奇迹好了。我们不需要什么巨大的昆虫，它不在这个狗屁地方的话，一切都会*好的*……”他四下看了看。

En: The sheer willpower in him MUST be making some dent in their incredulity. Some part of them must be thinking...
Zh: 他坚定的意志力肯定让他们减少了一些怀疑。他们中一定有人在想……

En: ...if he is *that* certain. And they are not. C'mon...
Zh: ……如果他真*那么*肯定的话。但是他们并没有。拜托……

En: Bugs everywhere. *Plants* turning into bugs. It's a typical hallucination. Every drunk past the age of forty has seen it.
Zh: “到处都是昆虫。*植物*变成昆虫。这是一种典型的幻觉。每个超过40岁的酒鬼都看见过。”

En: You're right about that...
Zh: “这你倒是说的没错……”

En: Fuck it -- I believe him. She looks at Vicquemare and shrugs.
Zh: “去他的吧——我相信他。”她看着维克玛，耸了耸肩。

En: I knew it! The bitch sees it. Bitches are fucking *smart*. But you dicks are dumb as fuck! It's real, I told you.
Zh: “我就知道！婊子明白了。婊子就是他妈的比较*聪明*。但是你们这群傻吊真是蠢得无药可救！它是真的，我告诉你。”

En: Move on. Don't gloat.
Zh: 继续。不要幸灾乐祸。

En: This is a conversation for when we are no longer out in the open, in Martinaise, where Evrart and Edgar Claire have ears everywhere. The lieutenant lowers his voice -- just a little.
Zh: 警督压低声音——只有一点点。“这个话题不适合在马丁内斯，在大庭广众之下谈论，这里到处都有艾弗拉特和埃德加·克莱尔的*耳朵*。”

En: And eyes too -- your return from the island must not have gone unnoticed.
Zh: 还有眼线——肯定有人注意到你从岛上回来了。

En: Understood. Of course.
Zh: “明白。当然可以。”

En: What? He lowers his voice. "On behalf of..."
Zh: “什么？”他压低了声音。“为了……”

En: The fatso.
Zh: “胖子。”

En: Edgar Claire.
Zh: “埃德加·克莱尔。”

En: Just nod.
Zh: 只是点点头。

En: For the sake of political neutrality I would like to *not* partake in anything Union-related.
Zh: “为了保持政治中立性，我*不想*参与任何跟工会有关的话题。”

En: This has to be good stuff for him to backpedal out of it at first mention.
Zh: 对于他来说，一开始提到就撤回意见肯定是件好事。

En: The fuck, you puss? This'll send shit flying. Trust Cuno. Grandpa laid down some real shit. *Conspiracy*-style.
Zh: “什么鬼，你胆子这么小吗？这他妈会飞起来的。相信坤诺。老头子有些。*阴谋论*的风格。”

En: If that's even remotely true, then a clandestine investigation will be required. It smells like *bad news* to me -- a classic shitkid case that'll get people killed. Or fired.
Zh: “如果真有那么极其微小的可能性，那就需要秘密调查了。在我来看，这是个*坏消息*——这种是典型的浑水案件，会害死人的。或者是被开除。”

En: Not discussing it further *out here in the open* is probably a good idea. People must have seen you return from the island. Word travels fast...
Zh: 不继续在*公开场合*深入讨论可能是个好主意。肯定有人看见你从岛上回来了。消息传的很快……

En: How? It seems to be ongoing. I see red banners on the gates.
Zh: “怎么会？它似乎还在进行中啊。我在大门上看了红色横幅。”

En: He didn't quite *solve* it -- he cross-pollinated information between the company rep and Evrart. Until the rep came to see that the Union desires war. At which point Mrs. Messier decided to... He shrugs.
Zh: “他还没有*解决*它——他在公司代表和艾弗拉特之间互相传递消息。直到代表发现工会想要发动战争。就在那时，梅西耶女士决定……”他耸耸肩。

En: What? Hand Claire the terminal?
Zh: “什么？把中转站交给克莱尔？”

En: Sounds like you got *played*, Harry. Because you were off your tits on Al Gul.
Zh: “听起来你被*耍*了，哈里。因为你被阿尔古搞得晕头转向。”

En: I did it for the World Revolution.
Zh: “我这么做是为了世界大革命。”

En: It was an accident.
Zh: “这是个意外。”

En: I just told some people some things. No big deal. Things are calmer now.
Zh: “我只是告诉了一些人一些事。没什么大不了的。现在平静多了。”

En: I masterminded a solution to an unsolvable problem.
Zh: “我为无法解决的问题策划了一种解决方案。”

En: You bet it was. Sounds to me like you got *played* by Claire. And it's true -- you *are* his little peone.
Zh: “最好是这样。在我听起来，你像是被克莱尔*耍*了。而且这是真的——你*就是*他的小傀儡。”

En: You bet it was. Sounds to me like you got *played* -- because you were off your tits on Al Gul.
Zh: “最好是这样。在我听起来，你像是被*耍*了——因为你被阿尔古搞得晕头转向。”

En: Vrrr... Viva la Revolución!
Zh: “呃……大革命万岁！”

En: Yeah. But for, like, conservative Revolution.
Zh: “是啊。但是，类似，保守大革命。”

En: Eat the pigs!
Zh: “吃掉那头猪！”

En: Yeah -- I probably got played.
Zh: “是啊——我可能是被耍了。”

En: Yeah -- I actually just got manipulated into it.
Zh: “是啊——实际上是我被操纵了。”

En: Cool. To me it sounds like you got played by Evrart Claire. And it's true -- you *are* his little peone.
Zh: “挺好的。在我听起来，你像是被艾弗拉特·克莱尔耍了。而且这是真的——你*就是*他的小傀儡。”

En: Cool. To me it sounds like you got played by Evrart Claire. Duped -- for the hundredth time.
Zh: “挺好的。在我听起来，你像是被艾弗拉特·克莱尔耍了。被骗了——第一百次了。”

En: Fuck you. You just got played by Evrart Claire. Duped -- for the hundredth time.
Zh: “去你的吧。你只是被艾弗拉特·克莱尔耍了。被骗了——第一百次了。”

En: You think? Claire played you like a fiddle. It's true, you *are* his little peone.
Zh: “你这么觉得吗？克莱尔把你耍得团团转。这是真的，你*就是*他的小傀儡。”

En: You think? Claire played you like a fiddle. You got duped -- for the hundredth time.
Zh: “你这么觉得吗？克莱尔把你耍得团团转。你被骗了——第一百次了。”

En: Maybe...
Zh: “也许吧……”

En: Hey -- how do you know about Al Gul?
Zh: “喂——你是怎么知道阿尔古的？”

En: It doesn't matter how I know about *Al Gul*. What matters is -- you're Evrart Claire's peone now. Just as I said. He's a *mob boss*, did you know?
Zh: “我怎么知道*阿尔古*不重要。重要的是——现在你是艾弗拉特的傀儡了。就像我刚才说的。他是*黑帮老大*，你知道吗？”

En: It doesn't matter how I know about *Al Gul*. What matters is -- you're Evrart Claire's messenger now. A *Union man*, as he calls it. He's a *mob boss*, did you know?
Zh: “我怎么知道*阿尔古*不重要。重要的是——现在你是艾弗拉特的信使了。就是他所谓的，*工会成员*。他是*黑帮老大*，你知道吗？”

En: It's not *quite* like that... The move allowed us to stabilize things here. It was *not* bad for Martinaise. And we don't owe anyone anything.
Zh: “其实并不*完全*是那样的……这样的举动让我们能够稳定这里的局面。对于马丁内斯来说，这*不是*什么坏事。而且我们也不欠任何人任何东西。”

En: Maybe? Certainly. You're Evrart Claire's peone now. Just as I said. He's a *mob boss*, did you know?
Zh: “也许？是肯定吧。现在你是艾弗拉特·克莱尔的傀儡了。就像我刚才说的。他是*黑帮老大*，你知道吗？”

En: Maybe? Certainly. You're Evrart Claire's go-to-guy now. He's a *mob boss*, did you know?
Zh: “也许？是肯定吧。现在你是艾弗拉特·克莱尔的和事佬了。他是*黑帮老大*，你知道吗？”

En: Is that why you want us to investigate the assassination of the previous Union head thing? To get off Evrart's hook?
Zh: “这就是你想让我们调查前任工会领袖遇刺事件的原因吗？为了摆脱艾弗拉特的控制？”

En: No. It's *nothing* like that. He was reckless with information -- but ethical. We don't owe anyone anything. This allowed us to stabilize things in Martinaise.
Zh: “不。根本*不是*这样。他会不计后果地获取信息——不过还是合乎道德的。我们没有亏欠任何人任何东西。这就让我们能够稳定马丁内斯的局势。”

En: God... Calm down, Jean.
Zh: “天啦……冷静一点，让。”

En: You fucking twisting his words again! My pig's not *dirty*. This is fucking *paladin* shit. He don't bend like that. Tell em -- He gestures for you to speak.
Zh: “你他妈的又想曲解他的话！我的猪猡一点都不*脏*。这可他妈可是*骑士*风格什么的。他不会那样屈服的。告诉他们——”他朝你比了个手势，让你继续说下去。

En: Silence. Good. The man doesn't know what to say.
Zh: 沉默。很好。他不知道该说什么。

En: Jean, stop brutalizing him... He's trying.
Zh: “让，别对他这么粗暴……他在努力。”

En: Silence. The wind blows.
Zh: 沉默。起风了。

En: See -- no one cares.
Zh: “看见了吧——没人在乎。”

En: I don't even know which jacket he's talking about. There have been... many things that he's found. He gets meticulous. But it's okay.
Zh: “我甚至都不知道他说的是哪件夹克。他找到了……很多东西。他变得很一丝不苟。不过这没什么。”

En: Yes, we can *see* the jacket. Fuck the world. Fuck police duty. Fuck Jean Vicquemare -- that's what it says to me. Fuck me. We've been through this.
Zh: “是的，我们可以*看见*那件夹克。去他妈的世界。去他妈的警察职责。去他妈的维克玛——在我看来它就是这个意思。去他妈的吧。我们之前就经历过了。”

En: Yes, we can see the jacket. 'Hey everybody -- I'm working undercover in a *hard fetish gang*. I don't care about anyone or anything.' We've been through this.
Zh: “是的，我们可以看见那件夹克。‘喂，大家快看啦——我在一个*硬核恋物癖帮派*卧底。我谁也不在乎，什么事也不在乎。’我们之前就经历过了。”

En: Dammit. Not *that* jacket, the one you got for the Doom Spiral. Forget it... It's not worth the effort.
Zh: 该死。不是*那件*夹克，是你帮厄运漩涡找到的那件。算了吧……它不值得你这么努力。

En: I confiscated drugs from Cuno's dad.
Zh: “我没收了坤诺爸爸的毒品。”

En: You don't want to know.
Zh: “你不会想知道的。”

En: Who's *Cuno*?
Zh: “*坤诺*又是谁？”

En: You're right, lieutenant -- I don't. He turns to you. "You snorted the drugs, I know you did. It's all right, I mean, at this point -- *anything* is but the drink."
Zh: “你说得对，警督——我不想。”他转向你。“你还吸毒，我知道。其实没事的，我的意思是，到了这个时候——除了喝酒，*什么*都可以。”

En: Yeah -- he really fucked the Cuno on that, the kid says with a respectful glance. "But that's old shit. Cuno's now. Pig's just being a good pig. That's cool to Cuno."
Zh: “是啊——他真的骗了坤诺，”男孩恭敬地瞥了他一眼。“但那他妈的都是以前的事了。坤诺现在变了。猪猡还是个好猪猡。在坤诺看来，还挺酷的。”

En: Great. Thanks. He turns to you. "You snorted the drugs. I know you did. Fuck it. It's all right. I mean -- honestly. *Anything* but the drink."
Zh: “太棒了。谢谢。”他转向你。“你还吸毒，我知道。去他妈的吧。没事的。我是认真的。除了喝酒，*什么*都可以。”

En: I don't care. You took some drugs from some kid. And then snorted them. It's all right -- honestly. *Anything* but the drink.
Zh: “我不在乎。你从小孩那里弄了些毒品。而且还吸了。这没什么——我是认真的。除了喝酒，*什么*都可以。”

En: Cuno's great. I should have taken him to the island. He'd tell you it's all true.
Zh: “坤诺很棒。我应该带他上岛的。他会告诉你这都是真的。”

En: Cuno's a street kid I helped.
Zh: “坤诺是我帮过的一个街头小混混。”

En: To hell with it. You wouldn't understand anyway.
Zh: “见鬼去吧。反正你也不会明白的。”

En: Agreed.
Zh: “同意。”

En: Yes-yes. Fallen through a gap in the boardwalk, drunk.
Zh: “是啊，是啊。从木板上摔下来，喝醉了。”

En: How did you know I found him?
Zh: “你怎么知道我找到他了？”

En: The body was transported to Precinct 41. Our morgue. I had Tillbrook and Mollins take care of funeral arrangements and family-stuff.
Zh: “尸体被送到了41分局。我们的停尸房。我让提尔布鲁克和莫林安排葬礼，还有接待家属之类的。”

En: You're not the only cop in the world, Harry. This all comes back to us.
Zh: “你不是这个世界上唯一的警察，哈里。一切消息都会返回到我们这里的。”

En: Still, she says quietly. "Good work with the missing person, detective."
Zh: “不过，”她小声说道。“失踪人口的事你处理的很好，警探。”

En: It's still a point for you. No denying it.
Zh: 还是要给你记上一分。这一点无可否认。

En: Yeah... it was what it was...
Zh: “是啊……有就是有……”

En: You hear gasps beneath the howling of the wind.
Zh: 在呼啸的狂风下面，你听见一声喘息。

En: Hosiannah.
Zh: “赞美上帝。”

En: This is what I've been trying to tell you about.
Zh: “这就是我一直以来想告诉你的。”

En: So -- as you can see, I'm a *pretty okay* detective -- an absolutely GIANT FASCIST.
Zh: “所以——你也看到了，我是个*很不错*的警探——而且还是个绝对的大法西斯主义者。”

En: So -- as you can see, I'm a *pretty okay* detective -- an abolutely GIANT COMMUNIST.
Zh: “所以——你也看到了，我是个*很不错*的警探——而且还是个绝对的大康米主义者。”

En: So -- as you can see, I'm a *pretty okay* detective -- an absolutely visionary entrepreneur.
Zh: “所以——你也看到了，我是个*很不错*的警探——而且绝对是个很有远见的企业家。”

En: So -- as you can see, I'm a *pretty okay* detective.
Zh: “所以——你也看到了，我是个*很不错*的警探。”

En: That's it. The cavalry has arrived.
Zh: 来了。救兵来了。

En: There is *no* challenging the fury the kid is about to unleash.
Zh: *没有*什么可以挑战男孩即将爆发的怒火。

En: What you're giving us -- it's not news. It's not proof. Or an observation. It's a cryptozoological factoid. You can get it from Paradox B, Aquarius, any *mystery* station. Here's *my* theory.
Zh: “你跟我们说的——不是新闻。不是证据，甚至算不上观察。这是神秘动物学的虚构陈述。你可能是从悖论B，水瓶座，任何*神秘*电台那里听来的。*我的*理论是这样的。”

En: Talked? Okay. What you're giving us -- it's not news. It's not proof. Or an observation. It's a cryptozoological factoid. You can get it from Paradox B, Aquarius, any *mystery* station. Here's *my* theory.
Zh: “聊过？好吧。你跟我们说的——不是新闻。不是证据，甚至算不上观察。这是神秘动物学的虚构陈述。你可能是从悖论B，水瓶座，任何*神秘*电台那里听来的。*我的*理论是这样的。”

En: That's it. The argument is lost.
Zh: 就这样了。争论失败了。

En: You know, maybe you should become a beach bum? Just a thought... Because this isn't going too good.
Zh: 你知道吗，也许你应该变成一个海滨的流浪汉？只是一个想法……因为现在情况不太妙。

En: It's *interesting* time. Forget about the rest.
Zh: 这是个*有趣的*时间点。忘掉其他事情吧。

En: Observation.
Zh: “观察。”

En: In his mind he's already planning a nature reserve and *knows a good guy* for that.
Zh: 在他的脑海里，他已经构想了一个自然保护区，而且还想到了一个*最佳人选*。

En: No. I wouldn't say it was... He looks to you.
Zh: “不。我不会说这是……”他看着你。

En: You're doing good here. Perhaps only for a moment, but still...
Zh: 你做的很好。也许只有那么一瞬间，不过……

En: Quit while you're ahead? Or... no?
Zh: 见好就收？或者……不要？

En: Chin up. Keep focusing on the positives here.
Zh: 别灰心。继续关注积极的方面。

En: I've never doubted you can pull yourself together and work -- in bouts. Bouts don't last. He buttons his jacket. "I can still smell the booze on the wind."
Zh: “我从来没有怀疑过你能振作起来，继续工作——一阵一阵的。但是不会持久。”他扣起夹克。“我还能闻到风里飘来的酒味呢。”

En: I moved information between the company rep and Evrart. Until the rep came to see that the Union *wants* war. At which point Mrs. Messier decided to go.
Zh: “我在公司代表和艾弗拉特之间互相传递消息。直到代表发现工会*想要*发动战争。就在那时，梅西耶女士决定离开。”

En: Go? And *hand* the terminal over to the Claire brothers?
Zh: “离开？然后把中转站*交给*克莱尔兄弟？”

En: Yeah... maybe I didn't.
Zh: “是啊……也许我没有。”

En: You think?
Zh: “你真这么认为？”

En: Okay... A slow nod.
Zh: “好吧……”他慢慢点点头。

En: You fucking twisting his words again! My pig's wasn't *duped*. This pig's fucking *mastermind* shit. He doesn't do like that. He doesn't get fucked. Tell em -- He gestures for you to speak.
Zh: “你他妈的又想曲解他的话！我的猪猡没有*被骗*。猪猡可是在背后*操纵*这些破事的。他不会那么做的。他不会被骗的。告诉他们——”他朝你比了个手势，让你继续说下去。

En: Of course. She turns to Vicquemare. "Call it community outreach, right?"
Zh: “当然了。”她转向维克玛。“把它当作是社区服务，怎么样？”

En: It could maybe roll it? Like a dung-beetle.
Zh: 也许它可以用滚的？就像屎壳郎。

En: Mhm... He ignores your answer. "Then it wouldn't matter if it's male or female. The bower would just be rudimentary behaviour from before the parthenogenetic mutation."
Zh: “嗯……”他没有理睬你的答案。“那它到底是雄性或者雌性就不重要了。凉亭可能只是孤雌生殖突变之前的初步行为。”

En: Interesting... He ignores your answers. "Then it is *especially* vulnerable to disease. A single strain of bacteria could wipe out the entire species. We're probably talking conservation efforts here..." He looks around, quickly assessing the coast.
Zh: “有意思……”他没有理睬你的答案。“那它肯定*特别*容易患病。一个菌株就能毁灭整个种族。我们*可能*说的是保护措施……”他四下看了看，飞快地评估了一下海岸的环境。

En: Keep it to yourself.
Zh: 自己保密。

En: It's *way* more than that. I'll win her back with this.
Zh: “*远远*不止那样。我会用它把她赢回来。”

En: Win *who* back, you don't even know her name!
Zh: 把*谁*赢回来，你甚至都不知道她的名字！

En: Now you make your case. Now is the time. Now or never.
Zh: 现在你要表达自己的意见。就是现在。机不可失。

En: But a case against Evrart would be big...
Zh: 但是立案调查埃弗拉特可是个大事……

En: I would prefer *not* to partake in anything Union-related. The consultant, too, has lowered his voice. "For political neutrality."
Zh: 顾问也压低了声音。“我宁愿*不要*参与任何跟工会有关的事物。为了保持政治中立。”

En: This has to be good stuff for him to backpedal out of it at first mention.
Zh: 他一听到这个就想抽身——这个案子一定有搞头。

En: Dodged the bullet there. For a moment it seemed like you were just wasting time.
Zh: 躲过了一劫。有那么一瞬间，你似乎只是在浪费时间。

En: Damn, now it sounds like you were just wasting time.
Zh: 该死，现在听起来，你似乎只是在浪费时间。

En: Damn, now it sounds like you were just wasting time.
Zh: 该死，现在听起来，你似乎只是在浪费时间。

En: Yeah! And he's not ten, he's fucking twelve!
Zh: “是啊！而且他不是10岁，他妈的是12岁！”

En: Yeah, he agrees, giving you a quick look. "Cuno's been around, seen shit, *real* shit -- he's not a fucking toddler!"
Zh: “是啊，”他飞快地看了一眼，表示赞同，“坤诺在这里待了很久，看过很多破事，*真正*的破事——他妈的坤诺可不是刚学走路的小孩！”

En: He appreciated you remembering.
Zh: 他很感激你还记得。

En: Yes. What he said.
Zh: “是的。他说的没错。”

En: I also solved the case. It's *solved*. All of it.
Zh: “我还把案子破了。已经*解决*了。全部的。”

En: Yeah, it was a massacre -- we got wiped. Where the hell were *you*?!
Zh: “是啊，这是一场大屠杀——我们一败涂地。*你*他妈又在哪里？！”

En: Don't make this *harder* for yourself, he says in a lowered voice.
Zh: “不要*再*为难自己了，”他压低声音说道。
